title: Looking for a part-time VA / private profile manager for a sensitive online presence.
description:
Looking for a part-time VA / private profile manager for a sensitive online presence.



The role requires discretion, emotional/social judgment, and careful communication. This is not a normal social media VA role and not a spammy growth-hacking role.



I’m looking for someone who can help with multi-platform strategy, messaging, profile/image presentation, community research, and lead organization.



The goal is to build a more consistent presence across multiple channels while making the profile feel human, warm, trustworthy, and discreet.



Main tasks would include researching
 groups, niche platforms, Instagram, and other possible channels; understanding group dynamics before posting; helping with profile positioning and image strategy; drafting posts, captions, and messages for review; organizing leads/messages; and suggesting ways to increase visibility without sounding spammy, desperate, defensive, or overly salesy.



Some communities can have hostile behavior or group politics, so I need someone who can help avoid unnecessary drama, keep the tone consistent, and know when to engage vs when not to.



You would not handle legal, medical, or highly sensitive conversations, and you would not reply to sensitive messages without approval.



Ideal candidate:



* Strong written English

* Good emotional/social judgment

* Discreet and comfortable with sensitive topics

* Proactive, but not reckless

* Able to research online communities before engaging

* Good eye for profile/image presentation

* Calm with group politics or hostile comments

* Organized enough to track leads, platforms, and follow-ups

* Experience with community management, online profiles, Canva/graphics, social media, client success, or PR is a plus



Best fit is someone warm, socially intelligent, proactive, careful, strategic, and organized. I want someone who can help create controlled, consistent visibility without making the profile feel fake, pushy, or off-brand.



Starting with a small paid test task first. If it’s a good fit, this can become ongoing part-time work.



Please reply with your relevant experience, whether you are comfortable with sensitive/private profile topics, how you would research a
 group before posting, your hourly rate/availability, and your MBTI type if you know it.

title: Looking for a part-time VA / private profile manager for a sensitive online presence.
description:
Looking for a part-time VA / private profile manager for a sensitive online presence.



The role requires discretion, emotional/social judgment, and careful communication. This is not a normal social media VA role and not a spammy growth-hacking role.



I’m looking for someone who can help with multi-platform strategy, messaging, profile/image presentation, community research, and lead organization.



The goal is to build a more consistent presence across multiple channels while making the profile feel human, warm, trustworthy, and discreet.



Main tasks would include researching
 groups, niche platforms, Instagram, and other possible channels; understanding group dynamics before posting; helping with profile positioning and image strategy; drafting posts, captions, and messages for review; organizing leads/messages; and suggesting ways to increase visibility without sounding spammy, desperate, defensive, or overly salesy.



Some communities can have hostile behavior or group politics, so I need someone who can help avoid unnecessary drama, keep the tone consistent, and know when to engage vs when not to.



You would not handle legal, medical, or highly sensitive conversations, and you would not reply to sensitive messages without approval.



Ideal candidate:



* Strong written English

* Good emotional/social judgment

* Discreet and comfortable with sensitive topics

* Proactive, but not reckless

* Able to research online communities before engaging

* Good eye for profile/image presentation

* Calm with group politics or hostile comments

* Organized enough to track leads, platforms, and follow-ups

* Experience with community management, online profiles, Canva/graphics, social media, client success, or PR is a plus



Best fit is someone warm, socially intelligent, proactive, careful, strategic, and organized. I want someone who can help create controlled, consistent visibility without making the profile feel fake, pushy, or off-brand.



Starting with a small paid test task first. If it’s a good fit, this can become ongoing part-time work.



Please reply with your relevant experience, whether you are comfortable with sensitive/private profile topics, how you would research a
 group before posting, your hourly rate/availability, and your MBTI type if you know it.

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:

WHY JOIN US?

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

HOW TO APPLY

title: Payroll Specialist, Australian Payroll Experience Required

title: Sales Closer / Demo Call Specialist
description:
About NeuraWeave AI Solutions LLC

We are a U.S.-based company that installs AI-powered voice agents for small businesses — helping them answer every call automatically, capture leads, and book appointments 24/7. We are growing and looking for an experienced closer to run demo calls and convert interested prospects into paying clients.



Your Role:

You will take pre-booked 15-minute demo calls with small business owners and close them into paying clients. Leads are warm — they have already expressed interest and been booked by our setter. Your job is to present the demo, uncover the prospect's pain, and close the deal. You will own the client relationship from close through onboarding and beyond, including check-ins and upsell opportunities.



What You'll Do:

Run 15-minute demo calls with pre-booked prospects over Zoom or Google Meet

Walk prospects through a revenue loss exercise to quantify the cost of their missed call problem

Present a live AI voice agent demo — prospects will call the demo number during the call

Present the offer and close

Handle objections confidently and professionally, including price, timing, and skepticism

Log all call outcomes in our Google Sheet

Send the onboarding form to new clients immediately after closing a deal

Conduct client check-ins and identify upsell opportunities post-close

Target: 2–4 closed deals per week (ramp period expected in first 2–4 weeks)



Requirements:

Strong spoken English is required — you will be speaking with U.S. business owners by phone and video

Proven experience closing deals on phone or video calls — required

Comfortable presenting and selling a technology product to non-technical business owners

Confident, consultative communication style — not pushy or scripted

Able to handle objections including price, timing, and skepticism

Comfortable on camera — all demos run over Zoom/Google Meet with video

Reliable internet connection, quiet workspace, and professional audio and video setup



Nice to Have:

Spanish speaking ability

Experience selling SaaS, AI tools, or digital services

Experience selling to small or local service businesses

Familiarity with GoHighLevel or Google Sheets



Compensation:

$8.00/hour base pay

10% commission on all setup fees closed

Pay is processed every Friday PST — please note this falls on Saturday morning Manila time

This role includes a 2-week paid trial period. To continue beyond the trial, you must demonstrate consistent demo activity and closed deals. Candidates who meet expectations will be offered continued employment.

Ramp period of 2–4 weeks expected before hitting full target volume



Details:

Remote / work from home

20 hours per week

Demo calls must take place during U.S. business hours (9am–5pm PST)

Hours are tracked via the OnlineJobs.ph time tracker — the tracker must be running whenever you are working



To apply, please include: your previous sales or closing experience, the industries you have sold in, your average close rate, and what your typical deal size has been. Applications without this information will not be considered.

title: Content Specialist
description:
About Fusion Vine

Fusion Vine is a remote-first company focused on building efficient, scalable systems that help businesses grow through smart operations, content, and digital execution. We specialize in combining human talent with AI-powered workflows to deliver high-quality results at scale.



Our team values clarity, accountability, continuous improvement, and performance-based growth. We work with clear processes, defined expectations, and a strong focus on outcomes.



Role Overview

Fusion Vine is hiring a Content Specialist to help scale content production through AI-assisted workflows. This role is ideal for motivated writers who can combine strong English skills with critical thinking and smart use of AI tools. Entry-level candidates are welcome: if you can think critically and move fast, we can work with you.



Key Goal

Produce high-quality, accurate, and well-structured content at speed: using AI as a tool, not a shortcut: while maintaining clarity, brand voice, and defined quality standards.



Responsibilities

Write and deliver content using AI models as a writing aid, not a replacement for judgment

Critically review and refine AI-generated drafts for readability, accuracy, tone, and structure

Fact-check content and ensure it meets quality standards before submission

Follow content briefs, SOPs, and style guidelines closely

Complete assigned article bundles within agreed timelines

Edit for grammar, readability, and proper formatting

Stay productive and proactive: do not wait to be pushed into tasks



Requirements

Strong English proficiency: written and reading comprehension

Ability to think critically and improve AI-generated content rather than copy it blindly

Self-motivated with a strong sense of urgency and follow-through

Reliable internet connection and a suitable work device

Ability to follow instructions, briefs, and feedback closely

Critical thinking and troubleshooting is essential

Comfortable using AI tools for content creation and editing

Entry-level candidates accepted: hustle and critical thinking matter more than years of experience



Nice to Have

Foundational knowledge or genuine interest in the topics being covered

Experience with SEO content writing

Familiarity with content management systems

Background in marketing, blogs, or long-form content

Prior experience working in a remote or freelance setting



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Speed of delivery: complete article bundles quickly and on schedule (e.g., 15 articles in 2 days, not 2 weeks)

Quality of output: submit polished, reviewed content that meets defined completion criteria

Critical thinking: demonstrate genuine review and refinement of AI outputs, not blind copy-paste

Responsiveness: jump into assigned projects immediately without delay

Consistency: maintain steady, reliable output throughout the trial period and beyond



Compensation

$3.50 – $5.00 per hour 

Rate determined based on experience, skills, and performance during the trial period

Piecework/bundle-based structure: payment upon completion of each assigned bundle

One-month trial period to assess fit and performance

Opportunity to increase rate and expand hours after a successful trial



Why Join Fusion Vine?

Fully remote work environment

Clear systems, expectations, and feedback from day one

Performance-based growth: your results determine your opportunities

Hands-on experience with AI-powered content workflows

Opportunity for long-term partnership if the trial goes well

Entry-level friendly: we value drive and quality output over credentials

title: Senior Accountant / QBO Bookkeeper with a US-based CPA Firm

WORK SCHEDULE:

-12 days (holidays and vacation days) of paid time off

- Flexible work hours if you do not like to work the night shift



RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Independently manage and execute the entire bookkeeping process in QuickBooks Online, ensuring accuracy and compliance;

- Own the full A/R cycle, including accurately issuing invoices to clients, managing documentation, and ensuring timely payment recording.

-Reconcile general ledger, journal entries, and bank statements on a monthly basis

-Prepare and analyze monthly financial statements

-Prepare annual budget forecasts

REQUIREMENTS:

-At least 3 years of experience working as an accountant (preferably in an accounting firm);

HOW TO APPLY

1. Have you worked for any US-based accounting firm and for how long?

title: Automations Specialist
description:
Let’s be clear. This isn’t a “follow-the-steps” kind of role.



At DAP Brands, we build systems that scale. We move fast, automate aggressively, and continuously optimize how work gets done across Sales, Marketing, and Operations.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented, technically capable, and solution-driven Integrations Associate who doesn’t just execute tasks but understands how systems connect, why they break, and how to make them better.



If you think in workflows, enjoy solving inefficiencies, and know how to turn manual processes into clean, automated systems...keep reading.



What You’ll Do



Build & Maintain Integrations

Set up, test, launch, and maintain automations using tools like Zapier, Make, and GoHighLevel. Monitor performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement long-term fixes—not band-aid solutions.



Optimize Workflows

Identify gaps in current processes and design smarter, more efficient systems. Work cross-functionally to understand needs and translate them into scalable automations.



Handle Technical Problem-Solving

Work with APIs, webhooks, and basic scripting (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL) to resolve sync issues, errors, and performance bottlenecks.



Document & Enable Teams

Create clear documentation for workflows and systems. Support internal teams by helping them understand and effectively use new automations.



Tools You’ll Work With:

1. Automation & Integrations: Zapier, Make, Webhooks

2. CRMs & Operations: GoHighLevel, Stripe, ClickUp

3. Collaboration: Google Sheets, Zoom, Google Workspace

4. Technical Stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, APIs



Who This Role Is For



You’ll thrive here if you:

1. Take ownership and don’t wait to be told what to fix

2. Think in systems, not just tasks

3. Enjoy solving problems at the root, not the surface

4. Are comfortable in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment

5. Care about building processes that actually scale



Apply here: 



Important:

To be considered, type “MAVERICK” in front of your full name when submitting your application.

ntum.

mber is doing at all times

Be comfortable executing, refining, and scaling this approach

Identify opportunities to improve efficiency and link quality

Focus on relevant, high-quality links — no shortcuts

Platform & CMS Ownership

Strong working knowledge of Shopify, WooCommerce, WordPress, and major CMS platforms

Able to audit and verify SEO implementation directly in-platform

Understand platform limitations and solve for them

Validate work on live pages — not just via spreadsheets

SEO, AEO & Product Development

Own keyword and content strategy aligned to AU search intent

Lead technical SEO (indexing, site structure, Core Web Vitals)

Drive AEO strategy (AI search, zero-click, entity-based SEO)

Implement structured data and E-E-A-T frameworks properly

Contribute to go-to-market SEO/AEO offerings, including:

SEO service packages

AEO / AI search positioning

DR / authority-building add-ons

Help shape how services are positioned, packaged, and sold

Reporting & Communication

Provide clear weekly reporting:

What’s been delivered

What’s in progress

What’s blocked

What’s driving results

Work directly with the agency owner

Clear, direct communication is essential

No fluff, no hiding issues — problems are raised early with solutions

Maintain full visibility across all SEO activity at all times

Requirements

7–10+ years in SEO with proven leadership experience

Strong experience in the Australian market (highly preferred)

Proven track record of owning execution and delivering results

Experience stepping into existing teams and taking control quickly

Deep expertise in technical SEO, content, and AEO

Hands-on experience with Shopify, WooCommerce, WordPress, and other CMS platforms

Able to QA and validate work directly, not just manage via tools

Strong communicator — clear, direct, and accountable

Comfortable working in a fast-paced, scaling environment

Application (Required)



Submit a 5–10 minute Loom covering:



How you would take over an existing SEO team in your first 30 days

How you track and manage team output day-to-day

How you ensure quality control across SEO work

A campaign you owned end-to-end (strategy ? execution ? results)



Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.



What Success Looks Like

You take control of the team quickly and confidently

You always know what’s being worked on and why

Output quality improves within weeks

Issues are identified and fixed before they become problems

SEO consistently drives measurable growth in traffic and revenue

You contribute to scalable, sellable SEO/AEO offerings

Final Note



This role is for someone who takes control, communicates clearly, and delivers results.



You’ll be supported during handover — after that, you are expected to lead independently, maintain control, and scale the function.



No babysitting. No guesswork. No BS.

title: Video Editor - Youtube Channel. (300k subscribers)
description:
We are an animated animal documentary YouTube channel with over 300,000 subscribers. We create engaging, fast-paced videos that combine storytelling, animation, sound design, and visual effects to keep viewers hooked from start to finish.



We are looking for a skilled video editor who can transform scripts and assets into compelling, high-retention videos that match and improve upon our current style.



Sample video style:


/watch?v=7Msk417U_x0&t=36s



What You’ll Do

Edit full-length YouTube videos (typically 6–12 minutes)



Combine:

Voiceover narration

Animal illustrations / animations

Sound effects

Background music

Maintain fast pacing and strong viewer retention



Add:

Zooms, motion, and subtle animation to static images

Visual emphasis (highlights, arrows, focus effects)

Scene transitions that keep flow smooth and engaging

Sync visuals tightly with narration for maximum impact

Use sound design to enhance tension, humor, and emotion



Structure videos to:

Hook viewers in the first 5–10 seconds

Maintain engagement throughout

Deliver strong endings



Key Objective

Your job is not just to “edit” — it is to maximize audience retention and engagement.



This means:

Every cut, zoom, and sound should have a purpose

No dead space or slow sections

Visuals should constantly reinforce what’s being said



Required Technical Skills

Adobe Premiere Pro (preferred) or equivalent



Familiarity with:

After Effects (strong bonus)

Final Cut Pro (acceptable alternative)



Core Editing Skills

Timeline editing (cutting, trimming, sequencing)

Pacing control (fast, engaging flow)

Jump cuts and rhythm editing

Scene structuring



Motion & Animation

Basic motion animation:

Zooms (push-in / pull-out)

Panning across images

Parallax effects (preferred)

Animating static assets to feel dynamic



Audio Editing & Sound Design

Voiceover syncing

Background music selection and layering



Sound effects timing for:

Impact

Humor

Tension

Volume balancing and clean audio mixing



Visual Effects & Enhancements

Text overlays (emphasis, labels, reactions)

Highlight effects (circles, arrows, glows)

Color correction/grading

Light effects for dramatic scenes



Export & Optimization

Exporting for YouTube (1080p/4K)

File compression without quality loss

Maintaining consistent quality across videos



Asset Management

Organizing:

Audio files

Visual assets

Project files

Efficient workflow with large asset libraries



Creative & Analytical Skills (CRITICAL)

Ability to interpret a script and visualize engaging scenes



Strong sense of:

Timing

Emotion

Storytelling flow



Understanding of YouTube retention dynamics

Ability to identify:

Where viewers might drop off

Where to add visual or audio stimulation



Workflow & Productivity

Ability to deliver 1– 2 videos per week (depending on complexity)

Fast turnaround time

Comfortable working with templates and repeatable formats

Open to feedback and iteration



What Makes a Strong Candidate

Experience editing YouTube content (especially storytelling channels)

Strong sense of pacing (no slow or boring sections)

Ability to make simple assets feel engaging

Understanding of viral-style editing techniques

Attention to detail (clean cuts, precise timing)



Pay

Per video, $50/ ~ 10-minute video

Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



How to Apply

Watch a few sample videos and understand the pacing and style fron the youtube channel



Submit:

2–3 examples of your past work (preferably YouTube content)

Be prepared to complete a short paid trial task

To confirm you’ve read this post, include the word “notebook” in your message. Applications without it will not be considered.



If you have ideas on how to improve pacing, engagement, or retention in our videos, include them in your application.

title: Bilingual Phone Operator (English / Spanish)
description:
I own a practice in Florida. This is a full-time remote position supporting a busy medical practice, and we are looking for someone with real experience working in a US medical office environment.



About the role

You will be the first point of contact for patients calling the clinic. This means handling a high volume of inbound calls, scheduling and confirming appointments, routing calls to the right departments, and processing pharmacy refill requests. You must be fully fluent in both English and Spanish. Candidates who also speak Haitian Creole will be strongly preferred and prioritized.



What you’ll be doing

You will answer inbound patient calls in English and Spanish in a professional and compassionate manner. You will schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments across clinic locations, route calls to the correct provider or staff member, handle pharmacy refill requests, and document call details accurately in the practice management system. You will maintain patient confidentiality and HIPAA compliance at all times.



Who we’re looking for

We need someone who is fully fluent in English and Spanish, both written and spoken. Haitian Creole fluency is a strong bonus. You must have prior experience working in a US medical office, clinic, or healthcare call center, and be familiar with appointment scheduling and medical phone protocols. A professional phone manner, clear communication under pressure, and a working knowledge of basic medical terminology are all important. You must be HIPAA-aware and comfortable handling sensitive patient information.



Important

This position supports a US-based medical practice. US medical office experience is required. Candidates without US healthcare experience will not be considered.



How to apply

Send a short introduction about yourself, your language fluency levels, and your US medical office experience. Please also answer this question: “Describe a time you handled a difficult or frustrated patient caller. What did you do and how did it resolve?” Applications that skip this question will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Accountant (Australia Accounts)
description:
How you'll contribute:

Financial Accuracy & Compliance

-Ensure the integrity and accuracy of financial records.

-Maintain clean books, ensuring all transactions are properly classified and recorded.

-Assist in local compliance and regulatory filings.

-Month-End Close & Reconciliations

-Lead month-end closing processes, ensuring all accounts are reconciled and financial reports are prepared on time.

-Conduct bank, balance sheet, and general ledger reconciliations.

-Identify and resolve discrepancies and anomalies before final reporting.

Bookkeeping Oversight & Supervision

-Supervise and support junior bookkeepers to ensure data accuracy and efficient financial processing.

-Provide guidance, training, and reviews to maintain high accounting standards.

Process Improvement & Reporting

-Identify gaps in financial processes and suggest efficiencies for better reporting and compliance.

-Work closely with the CFO to provide insights and reports for strategic decision-making.

-Assist in implementing financial controls and best practices.



What you'll need to succeed in this role:

Proven track record as an Accountant with more than 5+ years experience.

Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

Strong knowledge of month-end closing processes and financial reporting.

Experience managing or supervising bookkeepers or junior accountants.

Proficiency in accounting software – Both Xero and QuickBooks.

High attention to detail and a problem-solving mindset.

Comprehensive understanding of professional services business operations.

Considerate person and know how to navigate human relationships diplomatically to achieve objectives.

You work fast and pride yourself in getting a lot done in a short amount of time.

Ability to work independently and proactively in a remote setting.

Highly collaborative and communicative. You love working with others and are good at taking and giving instructions to achieve a common objective.

You have great English speaking and writing capability.

You're growth-minded and take responsibility for your own professional development, including staying up to date with the latest industry trends.

You are experienced in using practice management software.

title: Level Up, Engr! Turn Your EE/ECE/ME Degree into a Global Trade Career with Korea
description:
[Recruitment Validity Period]

Applications are open until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement.



[Join DongYang Engineering and Build Global Business Together with Filipino Talent]

- DongYang Engineering (DYE) is an engineering-based global trading company located in Ulsan, Korea, with approximately 30 employees.

- DYE provides engineering and procurement services in the shipbuilding, offshore, plant, and wind power industries. We also support sourcing and quotation work for electrical, electronic, and mechanical products by connecting overseas buyers with domestic Korean suppliers.

- In addition, DYE works with global partners such as Schneider Electric and Emerson, supplying our partners’ materials and services to customers in Korea.

- Currently, DYE has a 3-member overseas sales team composed of Korean and Nepalese tea
mbers who are fluent in English. We provide a supportive working environment so that new employees can adapt quickly.

- DYE also plans to expand its overseas sales and global operations team with a focus on Filipino talent. Therefore, this position offers future opportunities to grow into a team leader or management role.



[About the Position]

- We are looking for an Electrical & Electronics Inquiry / Quotation ERP Data Assistant.(Entry~Experienced Level)

- This position is responsible for checking overseas buyer inquiries and supplier quotation information, then accurately entering and managing the data in our company’s ERP program.

- Since the products are related to electrical, electronic, and mechanical fields, the candidate should be able to understand and distinguish basic product names, model numbers, specifications, quantities, unit prices, and quotation terms.

- The ERP input method can be learned by referring to our existing work records accumulated over the past 4 years. Internal tea
mbers will also provide guidance when needed.



[Company Introduction Materials]

- Company Introduction Video:



- Company
 Page:





[Responsibilities]

- Check overseas buyer inquiries registered in the ERP program

- Review product information related to electrical, electronic, and mechanical products

- Organize product names, model numbers, specifications, quantities, unit prices, supplier information, and quotation terms

- Enter organized information into each required field in the ERP system

- Check and reflect quotation materials received from domestic Korean suppliers

- Refer to existing ERP input records and enter data according to the company’s internal standards

- Confirm unclear product information or specifications with internal tea
mbers

- Manage quotation progress and related data in an organized manner



[Required Qualifications & Skills]

This position requires basic technical understanding because it handles information related to electrical, electronic, and mechanical products.

- Degree or background in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or a related technical field

- Basic understanding of electrical, electronic, or mechanical products

- Ability to distinguish product names, model numbers, specifications, quantities, unit prices, and quotation details

- Ability to carefully check documents, numbers, and technical information

- Basic Microsoft Excel and Word skills

- Ability to read English product inquiries and quotation documents and understand the basic contents

- Willingness to learn ERP programs and internal work systems

- Responsible attitude toward repetitive but important data entry tasks



[Preferred Experience]

The following experience is not mandatory, but it will be helpful for adapting to the role.

- Experience handling quotations, purchase orders, invoices, or product lists

- Experience using ERP, inventory management, purchasing management, or quotation management systems

- Experience in trading, export/import, purchasing, sourcing, or overseas sales support

- Experience communicating with suppliers or organizing supplier quotation data

- Experience reviewing product catalogs, spec sheets, manuals, or technical documents

- Experience with electrical/electronic components, industrial products, or machinery

- Experience organizing data using Excel



[Who We Are Looking For]

For this position, accurate understanding and careful organization are more important than fast typing.

This role is suitable for someone who:

- Handles documents and numbers accurately

- Can follow fixed formats and internal standards

- Does not guess unclear information and asks for confirmation when needed

- Can refer to previous examples and apply the same standards consistently

- Can handle repetitive data entry tasks responsibly

- Has an interest in global trade and technical products

- Wants to grow with a Korea-based global business team

ERP input data may be used for quotation review, supplier communication, and future export decisions, so a responsible work attitude is very important.



[Training & Work Support]

New employees are not expected to handle everything alone from the beginning.

DYE provides the following training and support:

- Existing ERP input records accumulated over the past 4 years

- Educational tutorial videos to help understand the work

- A mentorship program to help new employees adapt quickly

- Guidance from internal tea
mbers

- Additional explanations from a tea
mber who understands the current workflow



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

- This position is open to both entry-level or junior candidates and experienced candidates.

- Candidates with little or no related work experience will receive structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.

- Candidates with 3 or more years of practical experience in mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, electronics engineering, trading, sourcing, quotation management, ERP data management, purchasing, export/import, or related fields may apply as experienced candidates.



[Payment Term: Monthly basis]

- Probationary Period: 6 months

- For entry-level candidates or candidates with limited related experience, the probationary salary will follow the company’s internal guideline below.

- Months 0–3: USD 280/month

- Months 4–6: USD 300/month

Subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months.

The probation period may be shortened if the employee demonstrates fast work adaptation and receives an excellent evaluation. This has occurred in multiple past cases.



- Candidates with 3 or more years of relevant practical experience should indicate their expected salary range when applying.

- This information will be included as a required field in the Google Form submitted during the first application stage.

When completing the Google Form, please provide:

* Minimum expected monthly salary

* Maximum expected monthly salary

* Brief summary of relevant experience supporting the requested salary range

* There will be a 6-month probationary period during which 80% of the contracted salary will be paid. However, the probationary period may be shortened depending on work performance.

* The final salary will be determined after reviewing the candidate’s experience, technical understanding, work capability, communication skills, and overall fit for the position.



[After Regularization]

- Annual contract renewal is standard after regularization.

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

- If overall performance, including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations, is considered outstanding, - salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. This has occurred in multiple past cases.

- Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance business periods or when performance is excellent.

- Incentives are reviewed based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.

3. Paid Holidays

- January 1st, New Year’s Day, and Christmas Day are paid holidays.

- This applies to both probationary and regular employees.

4. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP 17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP 22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP 28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



[Closing Message]

This position plays an important role in accurately organizing overseas buyer inquiries and domestic supplier quotations for electrical, electronic, and mechanical products in the ERP system.



If you have a background in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or a related field, and you can handle documents and data carefully, you can successfully adapt to this role with DYE’s training and support.



As DYE plans to expand its global team with a focus on Filipino talent, this position offers the opportunity to grow into a larger role in the future.

title: Full-Stack Developer for AI Workflow Platform
description:
Company Description



PersonaOS is an AI workflow platform built to help businesses plan, create, test, and improve their marketing and creative systems faster.



We are building tools that combine full-stack software, AI workflows, automation, and intuitive product design. The goal is to make complex creative and strategic work easier to manage, repeat, and scale.



We are a small startup based in Riverside County, CA, but this role is fully remote. We are looking for someone who wants to be part of an early-stage team with real growth potential. This is a chance to help build new products from the ground up, test ideas quickly, solve interesting problems, and have a direct impact on the direction of the platform.



Role Description



We are seeking a Full-Stack Developer to help build and improve PersonaOS, our AI-powered workflow platform.



This is a full-time, fully remote role for someone who enjoys building new things, moving quickly, and turning ideas into working software. You will work across both front-end and back-end development, helping create clean user interfaces, reliable database structures, AI workflow integrations, and product features that make the platform more useful.



You will work closely with the founder and team to design, develop, test, and improve core parts of the product. This role is a good fit for someone who likes startup environments, wants room to grow, and is excited by the idea of building tools that may change quickly as we test, learn, and improve.



Responsibilities

Build and maintain front-end and back-end features for PersonaOS

Create clean, responsive, and easy-to-use interfaces

Connect front-end experiences to databases, APIs, and AI workflows

Help integrate workflow tools, automation systems, and AI APIs

Test new ideas quickly and help turn rough concepts into working product features

Debug issues, improve performance, and maintain clean code

Collaborate on product decisions, user flows, and technical implementation

Help shape the platform as it grows from early-stage product into a larger system

Qualifications

Experience with full-stack development

Strong front-end development skills

Experience with back-end web development and software development practices

Ability to write clean, efficient, and maintainable code

Experience connecting front-end and back-end systems

Proficiency with modern web technologies, frameworks, and tools

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

Comfortable working in a fast-moving startup environment

Good communication and collaboration skills

Experience with AI tools, automation, APIs, or workflow builders is a plus

title: Senior Campaign Manager
description:
REBORN is looking for a senior Campaign Manager to support the delivery of social media, influencer and SEO campaigns across multiple client accounts.



This is not an entry-level VA role. We need someone with real agency experience who understands how digital campaigns move, how deadlines and deliverables are managed in an agency and the importance of client  updates, and how to keep work organised without being chased.



You will help manage the admin, coordination, follow-up, reporting and day-to-day campaign operations across paid social, influencer activity and SEO. 



Key responsibilities:

• Support campaign delivery across paid social, influencer and SEO campaigns

• Coordinate campaign tasks, timelines, assets, approvals and deliverables

• Follow up with influencers, suppliers, clients and internal tea
mbers

• Chase contracts, campaign materials, live links, content approvals and reporting inputs

• Help prepare campaign reports and performance updates

• Work across Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Google Ads, GA4, Looker Studio and Google Sheets

• Support SEO workflows using tools such as Ahrefs, Semrush and WordPress

• Keep tasks updated in ClickUp and communicate clearly through Slack

• Identify delays, missing information and risks before they become problems

• Help make campaign operations smoother, faster and more organised



You must have:

• Previous agency experience, ideally in a digital, social, media, SEO or influencer agency

• Strong written and spoken English

• Experience supporting paid social campaigns, especially Meta and TikTok

• Familiarity with Google Ads, GA4, Looker Studio and campaign reporting

• Strong organisation and attention to detail

• Confidence following up with people professionally

• Ability to work full-time during Sydney, Australia business hours

• A proactive mindset. We need someone who spots what needs to be done, not someone waiting for every instruction



Nice to have:

• Experience with influencer campaign management

• Experience with SEO admin, content coordination or backlink tracking

• Experience using ClickUp, Slack, Google Workspace, Ahrefs, Semrush and WordPress

• Experience preparing client-ready campaign summaries or reports



Who this role is best for:

This role suits someone who has worked inside an agency and understands the pace, pressure and coordination required. You may have been a campaign coordinator, account manager, digital marketing assistant, media coordinator or project manager in an agency environment.



Who this role is not for:

Please do not apply if you have only worked as a general VA with no agency experience. We are specifically looking for someone who understands agency campaign operations.



How to apply:

Please send:

A short summary of your agency experience

Your CV or OnlineJobs.ph profile



A short Loom video, 2 to 3 minutes, answering these questions:

• What agency experience do you have?

• What types of campaigns have you helped manage?

• Which tools from this listing have you used?

• How do you stay organised when managing multiple campaigns at once?

• Why would you be a good fit for a Sydney-based agency?



Please include the phrase “Sydney Campaign Operator” at the top of your application so we know you read the full listing.



Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

title: Virtual Assistant for a house keeping company in San Francisco (Operations + Sales)
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a self-starter who can handle the dual challenge of managing daily operations and driving sales growth. You will be responsible for keeping our cleaning schedule running smoothly while actively closing leads and converting customers into recurring clients. This is a stable, long-term position for someone who is coachable, adapts quickly, and doesn't need constant supervision to get the job done.



Key Responsibilities

Manage the Schedule: Handle daily cleaning appointments, coordinate the team, and fix last-minute gaps or call-outs.Drive Sales: Cold call to find new business, follow up with past clients, and convert one-time bookings into recurring accounts.Close Leads: Make outbound calls to leads and maintain a high closing rate to keep the calendar full.Handle Hiring: Recruit, screen, and help hire new cleaners to keep the team staffed.Customer Support: Manage all texts,
s, and phone calls while ensuring every job is documented and finished correctly.Keep Systems Organized: Maintain the CRM, update internal systems, and run daily task lists.Communicate: Flag issues quickly and stay proactive so nothing falls through the cracks.



Qualifications

Bilingual: Must be fluent in both English and Spanish.Sales Expert: Proven sales experience is non-negotiable. You must have a closing rate of 45%+ on calls.Service Minded: Previous experience in customer service and working in a startup or fast-paced environment.Tech Savvy: Comfortable using Google Workspace, CRMs, and scheduling tools.Independent: Strong organizational skills and the ability to make decisions on your own.Preferred: Background in timeshare sales, high-volume sales, dispatching, or service-based businesses.



Schedule & Requirements

Hours: Monday – Saturday (6 days/week), 8:00 AM – 4:30 PM (30-minute lunch).Availability: You must be responsive during working hours. No ghosting or inconsistency.Accountability: You must follow through on every assigned task and be comfortable handling both operations and sales.



Application Instructions

To apply, please provide your sales experience and closing rate, your customer service history, and any startup experience you have. List the tools/software you’ve used and confirm your availability and time zone. To prove you read the entire description, please include your favorite color in your response. Finally, let us know why you are looking for a long-term role.



Pay & Commission Structure

Base Pay: Starting at $40–$45 per day.Review Bonus: $3 per review generated.Recurring Bonus: $8 per converted recurring customer.Booking Bonus: $5 per closed booking added to the calendar.Hiring Bonus: $10 per successful hire (after 30-day retention with at least 5 jobs done in a month).

This Role Is NOT for You If:

You lack sales experience or cannot confidently close on calls.You are uncomfortable with outbound or cold calling.You need constant supervision or struggle with organization.You are looking for short-term or part-time work.



If you really meet the requirements, I leave you the contact

We are Playbook Virtual Learning, an elite educational management firm based in Mississippi, USA. We are seeking a high-rigor Spanish Instructional Specialist to provide 1-on-1 language instruction for middle school students. We are looking for a specialist who can serve as either a Daily Homeschool Teacher (Morning Session) or an After-School Tutor (Evening Session).



The Role:

This is a high-standards position. You will not just be "practicing conversation." You will be responsible for leading a student toward high-school credit fluency using a structured, pencil-to-paper instructional model.



Key Responsibilities:



Instruction: Deliver 1-on-1 Spanish lessons via Zoom using a Document Camera (to view student writing in real-time).



Curriculum: Execute lessons using Savvas Auténtico (Realize) or similar structured K-12 curricula.



Standards: Align instruction with Mississippi World Language Framework standards.



Monitoring: Log daily progress in our Google Tracker, focusing on vocabulary, grammar, and pronunciation.



Communication: Maintain professional contact with the Executive Director regarding student mastery.



Requirements:



Fluency: Native or near-native Spanish fluency + Professional English.



Experience: 2+ years of formal teaching/tutoring experience with US students (Grades 6–12).



Technical: Stable fiber internet, quiet background, and high-quality webcam. Must be comfortable with Document Camera technology.



Background: Must provide or be willing to obtain a fresh NBI Clearance.



Compensation & Schedule:



Rate: ?250 - ?400 per hour (DOE).



Shift A (Homeschool): 8:00 AM – 11:00 AM CST (9:00 PM – 12:00 AM PHT).



Shift B (After-School): 3:30 PM – 6:30 PM CST (4:30 AM – 7:30 AM PHT).



Please specify which shift(s) you are available for in your application.



How to Apply:



Send a 60-second video intro in Spanish and English.



Mention your experience with Savvas Realize or other US curricula.



Include the word "PLAYBOOK" in your subject line.

title: Conversion Tracking & Attribution Specialist
description:
We're looking for a detail-obsessed tracking specialist to own the accuracy and reliability of our conversion measurement across all paid media channels. 



This is a freelance role (part-time to start) focused on auditing, implementing, and maintaining conversion tracking across multiple platforms and client accounts. You'll be the person who makes sure every conversion fires correctly, nothing gets double-counted, and attribution data is trustworthy.



What You'll Do

-Audit existing conversion tracking setups across Google Ads, Meta, and other paid channels to identify gaps, redundancies, and misconfigurations. 

-Implement and maintain conversion tags, pixels, and event tracking through Google Tag Manager, ensuring proper firing rules, triggers, and data layer configurations. 

-Configure and troubleshoot Meta Conversions API (CAPI), pixel events, and UTM parameter structures for accurate campaign attribution. Set up and manage call tracking through CallRail, including dynamic number insertion, multi-channel tracking, and call-to-conversion attribution. 

-Configure WhatConverts or similar platforms for lead source tracking across phone calls, form submissions, and chat. Implement and verify enhanced conversions across Google Ads and other platforms. 

-Build and maintain tracking for e-commerce purchase events, including revenue, transaction IDs, and product-level data. 

-Conduct regular QA across all tracking touchpoints — verifying events fire once (not twice), fire on the right actions, and pass accurate values. Document tracking architectures and maintain a living audit log of what's tracked, where, and how.



What You Bring

-Deep hands-on experience with Google Tag Manager (custom HTML tags, data layer variables, regex triggers, debugging). 

-Strong working knowledge of Meta Events Manager, pixel helper debugging, and CAPI implementation. 

-Experience configuring CallRail (or similar call tracking platforms) for complex multi-location or multi-campaign setups. 

-Familiarity with WhatConverts or comparable lead attribution tools. 

-Understanding of UTM conventions, naming taxonomies, and how parameters flow through CRMs and analytics platforms. 

-Experience with Google Ads conversion tracking, including enhanced conversions and offline conversion imports. 

-Comfort working across GA4, verifying event parameters, and troubleshooting discrepancies between platforms. 

-A QA mindset — you're the type of person who checks the check.



Nice to Have

-Experience with server-side tagging in GTM. 

-Familiarity with CRM platforms (HubSpot, Salesforce) and how conversion data flows downstream. 

-Exposure to multi-touch attribution models beyond last-click. 

-Experience with consent management platforms and privacy-compliant tracking setups.

We serve production companies, digital studios, music video directors, advertising agencies, and streaming platforms nationwide — delivering studio-level visual results at independent film budgets.

**Website:** 

*

ing for one campaign, then switch to the second campaign for the following two weeks. All scripts, contact lists,
 templates, and links for **both campaigns** will be provided to you in advance.

---



### ???? CAMPAIGN 2 — AI Virtual Real Estate Staging

*Weeks 2 & 4 of each month*

---



> **Important:** All contact lists, phone scripts,
 templates, portfolio links, and campaign materials for both campaigns will be fully provided by the company. You will never need to research your own leads or create your own content for either campaign. You simply follow the system provided.



---



We are looking for a **motivated, professional, and personable Virtual Assistant / Phone Caller** to represent Malibu Slimm Films LLC across two active outreach campaigns targeting video production companies and real estate professionals nationwide.



You will be calling on behalf of our Founder, **Jonathan Slack**, to introduce our services, build relationships with decision-makers, and generate leads. You will alternate between campaigns every two weeks — full details, scripts, and contact lists for both are provided.



This is **not a high-pressure sales job.** This is relationship-building and introduction work. You will be given full phone scripts, call trackers, pre-researched contact lists,
 templates, and all necessary links — everything you need to succeed from day one with zero guesswork.



---



## What You Will Do



- Make a minimum of **20 outbound calls per day** to production companies and studios using the provided contact list — all contact names, phone numbers, and
 addresses will be provided to you by the company

- Follow a **professional phone script** provided by the company — no need to create your own material

s when contacts are unavailable

 within 5 minutes** of every call — all

s** to the contact list in addition to phone calls — all
 addresses and
 content including links will be provided by the company

 sent** in the provided tracker (date, contact name, phone or
, result, follow-up date)

s sent, voi
s left, and leads generated

- ?? **Please be advised: All phone calls and
s sent on behalf of Malibu Slimm Films LLC will be monitored and reviewed for quality assurance.** By accepting this position you agree to this condition.

## What You Will Be Selling (On Our Behalf)



You will be introducing the following services:

- **AI Scene & Video Generation** — full scene creation and environment builds

You will be provided with a **pre-built list of 1,200+ companies** nationwide — including verified direct phone numbers,
s, and contact notes — organized by region and category. You will never need to find your own leads.



---



## What We're Looking For

 proficiency (Gmail or similar)

title: WordPress / WooCommerce Ecommerce Product Manager — Electronics Store
description:
Audio Video — Electronics Ecommerce Store



Audio Video, a large electronics ecommerce store, is looking for a detail-oriented WordPress / WooCommerce Ecommerce Product Manager to help manage product creation, product listings, cleanup, and ongoing catalog organization.



This role is ideal for someone in the Philippines with strong attention to detail, experience working with WooCommerce, and the ability to follow structured product upload processes.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



Creating new products in WooCommerce

Uploading product titles, descriptions, images, SKUs, prices, categories, and attributes

Cleaning up existing product listings

Organizing products into the correct categories and brands

Updating product descriptions, specifications, and product details

Checking for missing images, broken formatting, duplicate products, and incorrect data

Managing simple and variable products

Improving product listings so they are clean, accurate, and customer-ready

Following internal product templates and upload instructions

Reporting issues with products, pricing, inventory, or missing information

Helping maintain a professional electronics ecommerce catalog

Requirements

Experience with WordPress and WooCommerce

Experience creating and editing ecommerce products

Strong attention to detail

Good English writing and communication skills

Comfortable working with Google Sheets or Excel

Ability to follow instructions carefully

Basic understanding of ecommerce product SEO

Reliable internet connection

Available to work Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST

Nice to Have

Experience managing electronics, appliances, audio/video, or retail products

Experience with bulk product uploads

Experience cleaning up large product catalogs

Basic image resizing or formatting experience

Understanding of SKUs, model numbers, specifications, and product attributes

Pay



$5 USD per hour



Schedule



Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST



This is a long-term role for the right candidate.



How to Apply



Please send:



Your WooCommerce or WordPress product management experience

Examples of ecommerce stores or product listings you have worked on

Confirmation that you are available Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST

Confirmation that you are comfortable with $5 USD per hour

A short explanation of how you check product listings for accuracy

Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is organized, reliable, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing large electronics product catalogs inside WooCommerce. We need someone who can take ownership of product listings and help keep the ecommerce store clean, accurate, and ready for customers.

title: Digital Marketing Coordinator (Go High level Expert) - Longterm Dayshift
description:
TITLE:

Digital Marketing Coordinator (aka Go High Level Expert)



BUSINESS:

Our business is a dream to work for…

• We provide content promotion and lead generation to global personalities and professionals.

• Our focus (and soon to be your focus) is to help global personalities and professionals succeed by driving attention to their most powerful educational content and drive leads to their business to increase their sales. To do this, we recruit the best video editors, graphic designers, content writers, paid ad media buyers and more.



ROLE:

This role is perfect for you, if…

• You are looking to work in a role of an experienced Digital Marketing Coordinator

• You want to work on multiple clients marketing campaigns, working with media buyers/graphic designers/video editors/content writers

• You have confidence and enjoy speaking professionally with clients (written and verbal)

• You want to work remotely, full time (40 hours) a week - Monday to Friday

• You’re interested in Day Shift hours, during Melbourne, Australia business hours

• You have a University Level Education

• And, you already have advanced skills in building (or running) paid digital advertising campaigns



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Your responsibilities will include…

• Build and execute comprehensive project plans for marketing campaigns

• Coordinate with internal and external delivery teams, including clients, graphic designers, content writers, video editors, content writers, media buyers and developers

• Enforce end-to-end message congruency from the ad creative, ad copy, landing page copy, resource, etc

 copy, etc

• Ensure a campaign has the highest chance of success prior to going live

• Document and handover all campaign, funnel and ad resources to media buyer for them to manage post go-live

We will provide training on how to execute each item above, as long as you are the type of person who has the will to learn and master it.



REQUIREMENTS:

To be considered for this position, you are required to:

• You need to have a proven solid work experience as a digital marketing coordinator of at least 2+ years

• You need to have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 processor and 8gb of RAM

• You need to have a 2nd computer screen in your home office

• You need to have a fast and reliable Internet connection, with access to a back-up

• You have leadership abilities, decision-making skills, and problem-solving capabilities.

• You have proven experience as a content writer in lead generation, or project manager in a lead generation, or operated in a digital marketing environment.

• You have a results-driven mindset with a commitment to achieving project objectives.

• You have a strong attention to detail and highly organised

• You have a friendly, upbeat and team focused attitude

• Most importantly, you desire to learn and obtain new responsibilities



SOFTWARE & TOOLS:

• Google
 (gmail)

title: Experienced YouTube Video Editor + Thumbnail Designer Wanted for Long-Term Work
description:
I am looking for an experienced, professional, and dependable YouTube video editor to work with me on a long-term, on-call basis.



This is not a full-time role, and hours will vary depending on when new videos are produced. Some weeks may have work, and some may not. I am looking for someone who is comfortable with flexible hours and wants to build a strong long-term working relationship with a serious content creator.



My content is primarily educational, talking-head, and informational YouTube videos, so I need an editor who understands how to keep videos engaging, polished, and easy to watch while maintaining a clean and professional style.



This is not a role for flashy, over-the-top editing. I want someone who knows how to improve pacing, clarity, and retention in a way that feels natural and polished.



What You’ll Be Doing



Video Editing



Edit talking-head YouTube videos from raw footage

Remove mistakes, pauses, filler words, and unnecessary sections

Improve pacing and flow to increase viewer retention

Add tasteful zooms, transitions, and light motion where appropriate

Add royalty-free music when needed

Include simple text, visual callouts, and graphics when useful

Follow feedback, notes, and brand standards carefully

Deliver final edits on time



Thumbnail Design



Design compelling YouTube thumbnails that are clean and clickable

Use clear text, strong visual contrast, and mobile-friendly layouts

Create thumbnails that match the tone and branding of the channel



Who I’m Looking For



At least 2 years of experience editing YouTube videos

Strong understanding of YouTube pacing, audience retention, and storytelling

Experience editing educational, commentary, or business-style content

Ability to design quality thumbnails

Strong English comprehension

Reliable communication and professional attitude

Detail-oriented and able to follow instructions closely

Open to revisions and feedback

Able to work independently and stay organized



Requirements



Reliable internet connection

Quiet home workspace

Computer/laptop that can handle editing efficiently

Willing to use TimeProof for time tracking



Position Details



Pay: $3 USD per hour

Type: On-call / as needed

Hours: Not guaranteed

Location: Remote

Payment: PayPal



How to Apply

Please include:



Links to YouTube videos you personally edited

A short summary of your experience

The editing software you use

Thumbnail examples, if available



To show that you read the full job post, start your application with the word: RETENTION



I am looking for someone who values long-term work, consistent quality, good communication, and attention to detail. If that sounds like you, I’d love to review your application.

title: Virtual Assistant - Financial Planning Practice
description:
About Our Practice



We are a financial planning firm that operates on a simple principle: our standards must exceed our clients' expectations. Every client interaction, every piece of work, and every communication reflects our commitment to delivering an extraordinary client experience.



We believe that the client experience we provide determines who wants to work with us, and our goal is to be surrounded by successful, discerning clients who expect excellence. This position exists to support that mission.

 

Position Overview

We are seeking a full-time Virtual Assistant who will serve as a critical member of our client service team. You will be responsible for administrative support, CRM data management, and client communication/scheduling, all filtered through our commitment to integrity, initiative, and intelligence.



This is not a typical VA role. We don't need someone to simply complete tasks. We need someone who understands that every
, every data entry, and every client interaction either builds or erodes trust. We need someone who raises their own standards to match ours.

 

Primary Responsibilities

1. Administrative Support (20%)

• Maintain digital filing systems with zero-error accuracy

• Support advisors in document preparation, ensuring all materials meet our quality standards

2. CRM Data Management - Redtail (40%)

• Maintain accurate, complete, and up-to-date client records in Redtail CRM

• Enter notes from client meetings with precision and clarity

• Track action items, deadlines, and follow-up requirements

• Generate reports and workflows that enable advisors to deliver superior service

• Proactively identify missing information or data inconsistencies and resolve them

3. Client Communication & Scheduling (40%)

• Manage advisor calendars with strategic prioritization

• Coordinate client meetings, ensuring all parties are prepared and informed

• Draft and send professional client communications 
s, meeting confirmations, follow-ups)

• Respond to client inquiries promptly and professionally, always representing our high standards

• Screen and prioritize incoming requests to protect advisor time while ensuring client needs are met



How to Apply:



Do not send a generic resume. We receive hundreds of applications. Stand out by showing us you understand this role.

Your application must include:

1. Your resume - highlighting VA experience and any financial services background

2. A writing sample - Draft a professional
 to a hypothetical client explaining that their scheduled meeting needs to be rescheduled due to an advisor's emergency. Show us your communication standards.

3. In your response to this job post, please note in the Subject Line: "VA Application - [Your Name] - Standards That Exceed Expectations."

title: Administrative Assistant - Accounting Focus
description:
Administrative Assistant (Accounts Receivable Focus)



Are you an accounting whiz with a knack for keeping things organized? Do you love numbers, QuickBooks, and making sure invoices are on point? If so, we’d love to meet you!  



We are a small but fast-growing third-Party Logistics (3PL) company looking for an Administrative Assistant to support our Accounts, invoicing & Accounts Receivable operations. We need someone sharp, detail-oriented, and proactive who can keep the financial and administrative side of things running smoothly.  



 What You’ll Do:

-Manage accounts receivable, ensuring invoices are accurate and payments are tracked.  

-Assist with accounting tasks, including reconciliations, reporting, and data entry.  

-Work in QuickBooks and other accounting tools to maintain financial records.  

-Communicate with clients and internal teams to ensure smooth transactions.  

-Handle general administrative tasks such as:  

   -
 Management – Sorting, responding to, and organizing
s.  

   - Data Entry – Updating records, spreadsheets, and databases.  

   - Document Preparation – Creating invoices, reports, and other business documents.  

   - Scheduling & Calendar Management – Booking meetings, reminders, and coordinating with the team.  

   - Customer & Vendor Communication Support – Responding to inquiries, following up on payments, and coordinating with vendors.  

   - Filing & Organization – Maintaining digital files, invoices, and financial documents.  

   - Expense Tracking – Managing receipts, reimbursements, and petty cash records.  

   - Reporting & Reconciliation – Preparing financial summaries and assisting in reconciliations.  

   - Assisting in Process Improvement – Helping to streamline workflows and improve efficiency.  



What We’re Looking For:

 Experience required – at least 2+ years in accounts/accounts receivable.  

 Familiarity with QuickBooks and other accounting software. 

 Google Sheets or Excel proficiency is a must

 Strong attention to detail – because every number counts!  

 Excellent communication skills – written and verbal.  

 Proactive, reliable, and able to work independently. 



We are a US-based company but you'll get the following! 

 100% Remote Work – Work from home.  

 Growing Industry – Be part of an essential global logistics company.  

 Great Team Culture – We work hard, but we have fun too!  

 Working hours lean towards standard PH time

 Monthly Salary + 13th month pay + Annual Bonus 



If you’re detail-oriented, love working with numbers, and want to be part of a dynamic logistics company, we’d love to hear from you!  



 To Apply please follow the following instructions. Your application will not be considered without the following.

title: Amazon Account Specialist
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a sharp, autonomous Amazon Account Specialist to take full ownership of our Seller Central operations. This isn't a role for someone who just follows a script; we need a problem-solver who understands the "why" behind Amazon’s rules and knows how to navigate them effectively. You will be the sole point of contact for customer inquiries, account health, and tactical compliance.



Key Responsibilities

Account Health & "Tactical" Compliance: Monitor account health dashboard daily. Handle restricted product flags, documentation requests, and compliance hurdles. You should be comfortable finding creative, effective ways to resolve "non-traditional" compliance issues and navigating Amazon’s automated systems to keep listings active.



Customer Experience: Manage the daily inbox (typically 1–2 messages per day). Provide high-quality, professional responses that protect our seller rating and resolve buyer issues instantly.



Seller Central Troubleshooting: Act as the primary liaison with Seller Support. Fight for case resolutions, fix stranded inventory, and update listing data as needed.



Operational Support: General administrative tasks related to the Amazon storefront to ensure "everything is just handled."



The Ideal Candidate

The "Amazon Veteran": You’ve been inside Seller Central long enough to know that "The Rules" and "How things actually work" are often two different things.



Smart & Adaptive: Since volume is low, we don't need a robot. We need someone who can spend their time researching new workarounds or optimizing a process when things are quiet.



High Level of Discretion: You understand the nuances of compliance in the Amazon world and can execute strategies to keep the account safe without overcomplicating simple tasks.



English Fluency: Excellent written English is a must for both customer service and drafting persuasive appeals to Amazon.



Technical Requirements

Proven experience with Amazon Seller Central (specifically Account Health and Case Logs).



Experience handling "difficult" compliance or reinstatement issues is a major plus.



Ability to work independently with minimal daily supervision.

title: Amazon Compliance Specialist
description:
Regulatory & Legal Compliance



Conduct in-depth research on FDA, EPA, FTC, and other relevant federal and state regulations.

Ensure compliance with international product safety standards (EU, UK, Canada, Asia-Pacific) when applicable.

Perform ongoing monitoring of regulatory updates and interpret implications for product categories.

Support intellectual property due diligence to prevent patent, copyright, or trademark infringement.



Risk Management & Product Compliance



Evaluate new and existing products for compliance risks and advise stakeholders on mitigation strategies.

Develop compliance testing protocols and coordinate with third-party labs and certification agencies.

Manage corrective actions, recalls, or withdrawals in alignment with Amazon’s policies and legal requirements.

Conduct audits of product listings and seller submissions to prevent unlawful or restricted product selection.



Cross-Functional Collaboration



Partner with Product Development, Supply Chain, and Seller Performance teams to execute compliance initiatives.

Provide clear guidance to vendors, suppliers, and internal teams on compliance requirements.

Train cross-functional stakeholders on compliance best practices and emerging regulatory risks.

Act as a subject matter expert to business teams during product launches, regulatory reviews, and inspections.



Policy & Process Development



Draft and implement compliance procedures, standard operating protocols (SOPs), and escalation processes.

Support automation and system-based compliance controls to scale monitoring and enforcement.

Contribute to internal policy development regarding restricted products, product claims, and safety certifications.

Continuously improve workflows to enhance accuracy, timeliness, and audit readiness.



Documentation & Reporting



Maintain accurate records of compliance assessments, approvals, and regulatory correspondence.

Prepare detailed reports and risk assessments for leadership review.

Provide supervisors with regular feedback on task progress, emerging risks, and resolution status.

Ensure confidentiality of sensitive data, supplier information, and Amazon business strategy.





Experience interacting directly with regulators including federal and state agencies

Experience in research and analyzing federal and state regulations

Familiarity and experience in dealing with FDA regulation is REQUIRED

Familiarity with international compliance frameworks (REACH, RoHS, CE marking).

Experience in compliance auditing, regulatory affairs, or legal review.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

Excellent communication skills for engaging with global teams and regulators.

Ability to handle multiple projects in a fast-paced environment with strict deadline

title: Amazon Graphic Designer - Packaging
description:
In this role, you’ll be doing the following tasks



Study design briefs and determine requirements

Create packaging designs for various products

Create A+ listing on Amazon

Conceptualize visuals based on requirements

Prepare rough drafts and present ideas

Use the appropriate colors and layouts for each graphic

Test graphics across various media

Amend designs after feedback

Ensure final graphics and layouts are visually appealing and on-brand

Strong candidate’s experience and qualifications will include:



A strong candidate will have at least 3 years of proven work experience in Amazon listing or similar, extensive experience in package box designing and branding, knowledge in photo and video editing, a strong portfolio of illustrations or other graphics, familiarity with design software and technologies (such as InDesign, Illustrator, Dreamweaver, Photoshop), a keen eye for aesthetics and details, excellent communication skills, ability to work methodically and meet deadlines, time management and multitasking abilities, creativity skills and problem-solving aptitude and works best under pressure.

3D experience is required for this role.

title: Amazon Brand Manager
description:
Manage daily sales operations for assigned products, including pricing, promotions, and advertising campaigns (PPC required).

Oversee existing product listings and identify new revenue opportunities within respective categories.

Monitor product performance to ensure consistent sales growth and higher product category rankings.

Conduct in-depth product analysis to identify and address performance issues and enhance the customer experience.

Research market trends and competitors to uncover new opportunities and guide strategic decisions.

Collaborate with the inventory planning team to plan and promote excess inventory through effective promotional activities.

Ensure accuracy, timeliness, and confidentiality in all deliverables and data handling.

Provide regular updates and feedback to supervisors on progress, challenges, and opportunities.

Comply with all Company policies, procedures, and quality standards.

Perform other related duties as assigned.





Qualifications



Strong analytical background

Ability to make informed, quick, and calculated decisions based on large amount of data whether launching new products or updating current products

Highly efficient in time and task management

Has an entrepreneurial mind-set

Ability to develop an efficient collaboration system

Experience in conducting deep-dive market research

Excellent English communication skills both written and verbal

Excellent documentation skills

Good leadership skills

Willingness to continually learn on the job by staying on top of the latest strategies and promotional tactics

title: Amazon Research & Development Specialist
description:
DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES



Responsible for the end-to-end process of creating or enhancing products encompassing design, testing, and launch phases

Determine product specifications according to a number of various factors and uses

Research and development projects in the health, wellness, and medical product space.

Design, develop, and fabricate equipment, prototypes for laboratory and production use.

Use market research and sales data to make sure products are competitive and practical

Conduct experiments, feasibility studies, and pilot testing for new formulations, processes, and technologies

Submit proposals and designs for evaluation by the management before moving to the next stage

Continuously explore new materials, methods, and innovative solutions to enhance product performance and safety.

Ensure all R&D activities are conducted with a focus on quality, efficiency, and sustainability.

Ensure confidentiality of data and company information

Perform other related duties as required





JOB SPECIFICATIONS

Bachelor’s degree in Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Chemistry, or Pharmacy.

At least 3–5 years of experience in an R&D role within pharmaceutical, medical devices, or related industries

Skills:

Comprehensive understanding of regulations pertaining to dietary supplements, guidelines set by the FDA, and adherence to GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices)

Proven track record of successfully developing and launching products

Strong knowledge of pharmaceutical product development, equipment design, and fabrication processes.

Familiarity with regulatory standards in the health and medical product sector.

Exceptional proficiency in both verbal and written communication
