title: Mortgage Broking Admin
description:
Mortgage Broker Assistant for Female Led Business

- Remote | Full-Time

- Australian Mortgage Broking Support Role (Perth Timezone)

- Under Connective Aggregator (Mercury CRM)



Welcome, and thank you for your interest in joining Tailored Finance Collective.



We are an Australian based mortgage broking business seeking an experienced Mortgage Broker Assistant to support the Director and growing client base.



This is a fast-paced, detail-oriented role where you will be responsible for managing loan applications from pre-assessment through to settlement, while delivering a high level of client service.



You will play a key role in keeping deals moving, maintaining communication with clients and lenders, and ensuring all documentation and processes are handled accurately.



1. Minimum Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

Minimum 2 years experience as a Mortgage Broker Assistant (AU market)

Strong understanding of the Australian mortgage process

Experience using ApplyOnline

Excellent written and spoken English



2. Key Responsibilities



Loan Processing & Servicing

- Run and interpret servicing calculators

- Price existing and new loan scenarios

- Prepare files for broker/client meetings



Application & Document Management

- Collect, review, and verify client documents

- Prepare and package loan applications

- Upload and manage applications via ApplyOnline

- Manage files from lodgement through to settlement

- Handle MIR requests (lender follow-ups / outstanding items)



Client & Lender Communication

- Communicate with clients via
 and phone for document collection

- Provide updates and follow-ups throughout the process

- Liaise with lenders, solicitors, and third parties

- Act as a key support contact for client enquiries



Bank & Process Management

- Order and manage valuations

- Track loan progress and lender requirements

- Assist with construction loan progress payments 



Compliance & Applications

Assist with:

- FHOG applications

- Home Guarantee Scheme (FHGS)

- Supporting forms and documentation

- Ensure all files meet compliance and lender requirements



Systems & Workflow

- Use Mercury CRM to manage pipeline and client data

- Maintain Kanban/workflow boards to track deal progress

- Ensure all tasks are completed within required timeframes



Marketing Support (Bonus)

- Assist with basic Canva tasks:

- Social media posts

- Client updates / simple graphics



Skills & Experience

- Strong understanding of:

- Australian lending policies

- End-to-end loan process



Experience with:

- Mercury CRM (highly desirable)

- ApplyOnline

- High attention to detail

- Ability to manage multiple files at different stages

- Strong time management and organisational skills



About You

- Excellent written and verbal communication

- Confident dealing with clients and lenders

- Proactive and takes ownership of tasks

- Able to work independently and solve problems

- Comfortable in a fast-paced environment

- High level of professionalism and accountability



Bonus (Not Essential)

- Experience with Australian government schemes (FHOG, FHGS)

- Experience supporting construction loans

- Canva or basic marketing experience



Why Join Us?

- Work with a female led Mortgage Broking business 

- Long term, stable role with growth opportunities

- Bonus structures embedded & pay rises based on performance 

- Exposure to a high-performing mortgage business

- Supportive and structured systems/processes

- Hired direct so you are paid for your hard work, and not having to share with an agency 



3. How to Apply



Please include:



Your experience as a Mortgage Broker Assistant

Systems you have used (ApplyOnline, Mercury, etc.)

A short summary of your experience with Australian loans

Current working environment (home or office)



Thank you, and I look forward to speaking with you soon.

title: Web Designer/Developer Needed for Multi-Brand Websites (WordPress to Webflow)
description:
Web Designer / Web Developer (Philippines Only)

Project-Based (3–6 Months | Potential Full-Time)



Summary

We’re looking for a Web Designer / Web Developer based in the Philippines to manage, improve, and refresh multiple brand websites across Piccolo Me, FABE Group, SolBowl, and virtual brand landing pages.



This is a 3–6 month project-based role with potential to transition into a full-time position based on performance and business needs.



You’ll be working across existing WordPress sites, while supporting future Webflow migration. We’re looking for someone who can think beyond execution — someone who can recommend better UX, layout, and design based on brand direction.



What You’ll Do



Manage and improve existing WordPress websites across multiple brands

Recommend UI/UX, layout, and design improvements aligned with brand guidelines

Design and build landing pages for campaigns and virtual brands

Support or contribute to future Webflow migration

Update content, banners, and promotional assets

Improve site performance, responsiveness, and overall user experience

Apply basic SEO best practices and optimise for conversions

Troubleshoot and maintain websites ongoing

Work closely with marketing and design teams

Support light design tasks where needed (bonus)



Requirements



Strong experience with WordPress

Experience with Webflow (highly preferred)

Strong design + development capability

Good eye for UI/UX and layout

Experience building high-converting landing pages

Understanding of responsive design and SEO fundamentals

Proactive — able to suggest improvements, not just follow tasks

Able to manage multiple projects and work independently



Bonus (Nice to Have)



Adobe tools (Photoshop, Illustrator, etc.)

Basic graphic design capability



To Apply, Include:



Resume/CV

2–3 live website examples you’ve built or improved

Application Questions

Share 2–3 websites you’ve worked on (WordPress/Webflow).

?? Important: Applications without answers to the questions above will be automatically rejected.

title: Social Media VA
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a detail-oriented, self-directed virtual assistant to support a multi-client content strategy operation based in the US. You will be the research and organizational backbone behind a senior content strategist who serves founder-led brands in health, wellness, and creative industries.



This is not a creative role. You are not writing content or making strategic decisions. You are gathering the raw material, organizing the systems, and keeping the calendar running so the strategist can focus on high-level creative and strategic work.

This role is fully remote and async-first. We communicate primarily through Slack or Voxer and work from shared systems. You will be expected to deliver consistent, high-quality work on a weekly cadence with minimal oversight after onboarding.



Core Responsibilities

1. Trending Topic & Hot-Take Research  (~3–4 hours/week)

Monitor a provided list of accounts, hashtags, and industry sources across Instagram, TikTok, X, and relevant publications

Deliver a weekly research brief organized by client, highlighting what’s trending, what competitors are posting, and what’s generating conversation

Flag potential content angles, controversial takes, and emerging narratives worth responding to

Identify gaps — topics the audience is asking about that competitors aren’t covering well



2. Audience & Engagement Research  (~1–2 hours/week)

Pull recurring themes from comments, DMs, and community questions across each client’s channels

Track audience language and phrasing that can be mined for hooks and content angles

Note frequently asked questions and common misconceptions in each client’s niche



3. Content Calendar Management  (~3–4 hours/week)

Populate and maintain a visual content calendar (Milanote or equivalent) for each client

Ensure every calendar card includes: final copy, assets/design files, posting date and time, platform, and any relevant notes

Keep the calendar updated as content is approved, revised, or rescheduled

Coordinate with the strategist on weekly calendar reviews



4. Scheduling & Posting  (~1–2 hours/week)

Schedule approved content to the correct platforms using each client’s scheduling tool

Double-check formatting, hashtags, tags, captions, and links before posts go live

Flag any posting errors or issues immediately



5. Analytics Pulls  (~1 hour/week)

Export weekly performance data from each client’s social platforms

Organize into a simple, consistent reporting template so the strategist can review quickly

Highlight top-performing and underperforming content without interpretation — just surface the data

What This Role Is Not

You are not writing captions, scripts, or creative copy

You are not making strategic content decisions or choosing what gets posted

You are not responding to DMs, comments, or community messages

You are not designing graphics or editing video

Your job is to make the strategist’s job faster and smoother by handling the research, organization, and operational tasks that consume time but don’t require senior-level judgment.



Ideal Candidate

Experience working in or around social media content, marketing, or digital strategy — particularly for US-based brands or creators

Extremely organized with strong attention to detail

Comfortable navigating Instagram, TikTok, X, LinkedIn, and social analytics dashboards as an active user, not just theoretically

Familiar with visual project management tools (Milanote, Notion, Trello, Asana, or similar)

Strong written communication in English — research briefs should be clear, concise, and well-organized

Self-directed — able to complete recurring tasks on a weekly cadence without being reminded

Comfortable working asynchronously across time zones with check-ins via Slack or Voxer

Reliable internet connection and a quiet working environment

Interest in or familiarity with health, wellness, fitness, or creator economy content is a strong plus





You are a good writer and are a keen researcher. 

You should have at least 5 years experience.

title: B2B Lead Generation & Appointment Setting Specialist — Energy Grants & Incentives
description:
Here is the polished version:



---



**JOB TITLE:**



---



**TYPE OF EMPLOYMENT:**

Part-Time (with potential to grow into Full-Time)



---



**JOB DESCRIPTION:**



Green Light Energy Conservation helps businesses and commercial properties save money through:



- HVAC grants and rebates in New Jersey

- Small business grants in New Jersey

- Utility bill auditing nationwide

- Water conservation programs



We work with commercial property owners, property managers, HVAC contractors, boiler contractors, supply houses, accountants, real estate agents, small business owners, and referral partners across New Jersey and nationwide.



This role is for someone who can help us find the right leads, reach decision makers, qualify opportunities, book calls, and keep everything organized in our CRM.



This is not a basic VA or admin job. We are looking for someone who can create real sales opportunities and help build a repeatable outbound system.



---



**Main Responsibilities:**



- Build and clean targeted lead lists

- Research companies and identify the right decision makers

- Call commercial property owners, contractors, property managers, accountants, and business owners

- Explain our services in a simple, clear, and professional way

- Ask qualifying questions to identify real opportunities

- Book appointments and follow-up calls for our director

- Send follow-up
s and texts when needed

- Update HubSpot CRM with accurate notes, statuses, and next steps

- Follow up consistently so no opportunity falls through the cracks

- Organize prospects by service type — HVAC grants, small business grants, utility bill auditing, or water conservation

- Provide daily updates on calls made, conversations had, appointments set, and follow-ups pending



---



**We Are Looking For Someone Who Is:**



- Comfortable making outbound B2B calls to business owners and decision makers

- Organized, detail-oriented, and reliable with follow-up

- Able to follow a script but also think naturally during a real conversation

- Good at asking questions and qualifying prospects

- Comfortable working inside a CRM

- Willing to learn our business and improve over time

- Proactive — someone who suggests ways to improve the process, not just follows instructions



---



**Bonus Experience:**



- B2B cold calling and appointment setting

- Lead generation and list building

- HubSpot CRM

- LinkedIn prospecting

-
 outreach

- Industry experience in real estate, construction, HVAC, energy, solar, utilities, commercial services, or finance

- Experience calling U.S. businesses



---



**IMPORTANT — Please Read Before Applying:**



Do not send a generic application. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



In the subject line or heading of your application, include your DISC score or IQ test score if you have one taken on OnlineJobs.ph.



Start your application with the words **GREEN LIGHT.**



Then respond with exactly 7 points:



1. Your cold calling and outbound sales experience — how long and what type of roles

2. How many outbound calls you can comfortably make per day

3. The industries you have called for in the past

4. Your single strongest skill — lead generation, cold calling, appointment setting, CRM follow-up, or closing

5. What CRM systems you have used and your comfort level with each

6. One specific result or success you had in a past sales or appointment setting role — be specific with numbers if possible

7. What you would do in your first 7 days if hired for this role

title: Real Estate Social Media Video Editter/VA Admin
description:

title: AI Content Creator — Female Influencer Social Media Accounts
description:
AI Content Creator — Female Influencer Social Media Accounts

Pay: $400/month (paid weekly) Type: Full-time, Remote Schedule: Flexible — output-based





The Role

We're looking for a full-time AI content creator to produce short-form video content (Instagram Reels) for a female influencer's social media accounts. You will be creating 10-12 reels per day across 4 Instagram accounts, each with a different content style.



This is an execution-focused role. You will receive reference reels to recreate using AI generation tools, add music/audio, text overlays, and captions, then schedule the finished content for posting.



The content ranges from simple (motion clips with trending audio) to moderate complexity (multi-clip reels with voiceover and text). You will also be required you to create variations — changing hooks, captions, angles, music, etc  while keeping the same visual format.





What You'll Do

Receive a list of reference reels and recreate them using AI image and video generation tools

Generate AI images and videos of a consistent character using provided reference photos

Edit reels: add trending music, text overlays, captions, and transitions

Create variations of proven formats with different hooks and caption angles

Schedule finished content to Instagram accounts using a scheduling tool like Metricool

Source trending audio/music from the reference reels you are copying

Maintain consistent quality and volume across all accounts daily





Requirements

Experience with AI video/image generation tools is required. Such as ComfyUI, Kling,Nano Banana, Higgsfield, LoRa training, etc. You must be comfortable prompting, troubleshooting failed outputs, and iterating to get usable results.

Ability to edit short-form video (CapCut, Filmora, or equivalent — your choice of tool)

Familiarity with Instagram Reels and short-form content trends

Reliable internet connection

Self-motivated — you manage your own schedule and hit daily output targets

Strong attention to detail and consistency

English proficiency for communication

Experience creating content for influencer or creator accounts

Creative instincts — ability to identify trending formats and create effective variations, not just copies

Understanding of what makes short-form content perform on Instagram

To Apply

Send a short message with:



Your experience with AI generation tools (which ones, how long, what you've made)

A link to any content you've created using AI tools (if available). Social media accounts you’ve worked on, (if applicable)

Confirm you're available for full-time work

About the Role

This is a long-term position with a growing agency. You'll start with clear SOPs and reference material. As the content system matures and we identify what performs best, there will be opportunity for more creative autonomy and increased pay.

title: Architectural Assistant / ArchiCAD Drafter for Energy Ratings
description:
I am looking for a technical specialist to assist with residential energy ratings for my business, Verde Studio. The focus of this role is strictly on thermal performance modeling and NatHERS certification.



I need someone who is highly proficient in Hero (preferred) or FirstRate5. You must be able to take a set of PDF plans and independently model the building to achieve a 7-star rating.



Key Responsibilities



Performing full data entry and thermal modeling in Hero or FirstRate5.



Reviewing architectural plans and specifications to extract building fabric data.



Testing different specifications to find the most cost-effective pathway to 7 stars.

Analytical Skills: The ability to look at a failing rating and suggest the right changes to insulation or glazing to reach 7 stars.

title: CRO Insights Analyst (AI-Assisted)
description:
CRO Insights Analyst (AI-Assisted) — Full-Time, Long-Term, Work From Home



We are Lunify, a UK-based conversion rate optimisation (CRO) agency working with high-growth Direct-to-Consumer ecommerce brands in women's health, beauty, and wellness. We are hiring our first dedicated full-time analyst to own the research and insights layer of our delivery.



This is a long-term, work-from-home role. We are looking for someone who wants to build a career with us — not freelance project work.



ABOUT THE ROLE



You will turn cross-channel data into clear, evidence-backed insights and test hypotheses every week, for each of our clients. Our agency leadership decides what gets tested. Your job is to surface the patterns and evidence that make those decisions sharp.



This is an AI-augmented role. You will use Claude every single day to synthesise data, customer research, and patterns across channels. We will provide a Claude Max account and all other tools you need.



WHAT YOU WILL DO (WEEKLY, PER CLIENT)



- Pull data from Google Analytics 4, Microsoft Clarity, Shopify, Meta Ads Manager, and survey tools

- Synthesise findings across paid ads, landing pages, behaviour data, and Voice of Customer (VOC) research

- Produce 3 to 5 evidence-backed insights using our framework

- Suggest 2 to 3 test hypotheses with prioritisation reasoning

- Maintain Airtable as our research and testing knowledge base

- Record a 10 to 15 minute Loom walkthrough of your weekly findings



WHAT YOU WILL NOT DO



- Make final strategic decisions (the agency owner does this)

- Speak directly with clients (not in this role, may grow later)

- Design or write copy

- Implement code or run experiments



OUR INSIGHT FRAMEWORK (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Every insight you produce must include:



1. Observation — the fact, with numbers

2. Evidence — minimum 2 to 3 sources supporting it

3. Interpretation — your reasoning for why it is happening

4. Confidence level — low, medium, or high

5. Suggested test — what we could test to act on the insight



We will judge the quality of your reasoning, not just your conclusions. We want a thinking partner, not a report writer.



WHO YOU ARE



Required:

- 2 or more years of experience in marketing analytics, CRO, growth analyst, or similar role

- Strong working knowledge of Google Analytics 4 (custom reports, funnels, attribution)

- Familiar with Microsoft Clarity, Shopify analytics, and Meta Ads Manager

- Comfortable with Airtable (or Notion / Coda databases)

- Excellent written English — your weekly reports must be clear, precise, and easy to read



AI literacy is essential, not optional. You must:

- Be experienced using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or similar) for daily analysis and synthesis work

- Be comfortable building structured AI projects with brand-specific context (e.g. Claude Projects, Custom GPTs)

- Understand AI failure modes (hallucinated patterns, false confidence, surface-level summaries)



If you only use AI to "summarise things," this role is not for you. We want someone who treats AI as a thinking partner.



You will work in Claude (we provide a Claude Max account), but we welcome examples of work you have done in any AI tool as evidence of your skill.



Bonus skills (not required):

- Make.com or Zapier experience for automating reporting

- Experience with DTC ecommerce brands specifically

- Familiarity with statistical significance in A/B testing



WORKING ARRANGEMENT



- Full-time, 40 hours per week

- Work-from-home, Philippines hours (9am to 6pm Manila time)

- One fixed weekly overlap meeting with the founder at 4:30pm Manila time on Mondays (30 minutes)

- All other communication is asynchronous via Slack and Loom

- We are an async-first team — we do not expect you to be online outside your working hours



SALARY AND BENEFITS



- PHP 48,000 to PHP 84,000 per month (USD 800 to 1,500), depending on experience and test task quality

- 13th month pay

- Paid time off — 15 days per year, plus Philippine public holidays

- All tools and software paid for by Lunify (Claude Max, Airtable, etc.)

- Long-term role with growth path — strong performers will see salary reviews every 6 months



HIRING PROCESS



1. Apply via this listing with your CV and a short message

2. In your message, please include:

   - The word "Conversion" at the start, so we know you read the full post

   - One paragraph describing a CRO insight you have surfaced in past work

   - The AI tools you use weekly and one workflow you have built (any AI tool — show us your skill)

3. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a paid test task: analyse a real (anonymised) week of data from one of our brands and produce one insight using our framework. You will be paid USD 50 for the test task regardless of outcome.

4. Final interview with the founder via Zoom



We are not looking for the fastest applicant. We are looking for the sharpest thinker. Take your time on the application.



We look forward to working with you.

title: Marketing & Email Operations VA — Luxury Brand (Klaviyo + Canva + Outreach)
description:
I run a luxury residential interior design firm based in Los Angeles, with editorial coverage in Architectural Digest, Elle Decor, and the Wall Street Journal. I'm hiring a sharp, self-directed VA to run my outreach, lifecycle
, and social media operations end-to-end so I can stay focused on clients and creative direction.



This is a hands-on doer role, not a creative one. You'll build the sheets, run the merges, format the slides, write first-draft copy, and ship the campaigns. I review and refine copy before anything important goes out — you don't have to be a luxury copywriter on day one. You do have to be sharp, organized, and a strong writer in English.



If you need a lot of direction, this is not the right role. If you are systematic, proactive, and fluent in AI tools, keep reading.



What you'll own:



- Cold outreach to real estate industry — research contacts, build the tracking sheet, send the merge, run the follow-up sequence, report what's converting

- Klaviyo for the editorial site — welcome series, weekly newsletter, segmentation, abandonment flows, A/B tests, performance reporting

- Social media graphics and scheduling — format captions, carousels, and slide content in Canva using provided brand templates, schedule across Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest

- Contact research using LinkedIn and tools like Apollo or RocketReach

- First-draft
 and caption copy — I review and refine before send

- SOPs — if you do it twice, you document it



What I'm looking for:



- 2+ years of hands-on
 marketing or outreach experience

- Klaviyo experience or strong familiarity — flows, segmentation, campaigns, basic reporting

- Comfortable running mail merges. YAMM preferred, but if you've run Lemlist, Instantly, Smartlead, or similar, I'll bring you up to speed in week one

- Comfortable in Canva — formatting templates, building carousels, and producing slide content from supplied brand assets

- Strong contact research skills (LinkedIn, Apollo, RocketReach, or similar)

- You use Claude (preferably) or ChatGPT daily — not as a novelty, as a habit

- Excellent written English

- You communicate proactively. If something is delayed or unclear, you say so before I notice

- Self-managed — I set targets, you manage your time and report what got done

- Overlap with Pacific Time (Los Angeles)



How to apply:



Apply through this post. In your application, answer these four questions in this order:



1. What AI tools do you use daily and for what tasks?

2. Describe one specific
 marketing campaign you ran — what it was, what it produced, and which platform you used.

3. Rate your written English and conversational English on a 1–10 scale, (1 being beginner and 10 being proficient/excellent)

4. Write a 75-word cold outreach opener to a luxury LA real estate broker who just sold a $12M property in Bel Air. Write it as if it's the first
 the broker will ever receive fro
.



Question 4 is the writing test. Applications that don't answer all four questions will not be reviewed.



See my work at 
.

title: Appointment Setter & Lead Manager
description:
Main Job

Call new leads as fast as possible, book them, and collect all booking details including payment info.

Speed matters most—call within 5 minutes of a new lead notification.



FOR YOU TO APPLY FOR THIS JOB YOU MUST SEND A VOICE RECORDING OF THE SCRIPT BELOW. IT DOES NOT HAVE TO BE PERFECT. I WILL NOT REPLY TO ANYONE IF YOU DO NOT REPLY TO THIS POST WITH A VOICE RECORDING OF THE SCRIPT.



Daily Tasks

Check Gmail + HighLevel for new leads

Call immediately when a lead comes in

Follow the script

Book appointments into calendar

Collect:

Full name

Address

Service they want

Card on file (required to book)



Pay

$2 per hour

$3 for every booked job



You are allowed to work on other tasks during your shift, but whenever a new lead comes in, you must call it within 5 minutes.





???? INBOUND CALL SCRIPT

1. Opening

“Hey, this is (name) with Revive Detail BR, how can I help you?”



2. Find the Problem

“Got you—what’s the main reason you’re looking to get it detailed right now?”



3. Lean Into the Problem

“Yeah, you definitely called the right people. We deal with that all the time—whether it’s pet hair, kids making a mess, spills, all of it.”



4. Qualify Them

“Have you ever had your car professionally detailed before?”



5. Explain the Service

“Got it. So how we work is we’re fully mobile—we come straight to you. And this is more of a deep clean, not just a basic wash.”

“On the interior we do a full deep vacuum, blow out all the tight areas, steam clean, and disinfect all surfaces—basically giving the interior a full reset.”

“On the exterior we degrease the wheels and tires, remove bugs, do a pre-wash, foam bath with a hand wash, towel dry, clean door jambs, and finish with tire shine.”



6. Confirm Interest

“So based on what you were telling me, is that pretty much what you had in mind?”



7. Paint the Result

“Perfect. When we’re done, it’s going to look and feel like a completely different car—honestly most people say it feels brand new again.”



8. Price + Add-Ons

“As you probably saw, our full detail is $180.”

“Now depending on what you mentioned, we also offer a few add-ons if needed:

 • Seat shampooing – $50

 • Pet hair removal – $45

 • Engine bay cleaning – $50

 • Stain removal – $40 (if this is what they pick, say you will only charge for it if you get the stain out)

If your car has (their issue), I’d definitely recommend adding that so we can get the best result possible.”



9. Introduce Membership

“Now most people don’t just do this once, because the car gets dirty again.”



10. Explain Why

“So what a lot of our clients do is go on a maintenance plan after the first detail.”

“We offer monthly, bi-monthly, or quarterly—and we discount it since we already did that first deep clean.”

“Monthly is $60 off, bi-monthly is $45 off, and quarterly is $30 off.”



11. Personalize

“And especially with (kids/dogs/work), it’s going to get dirty again anyway—so instead of starting over every time, we just keep it clean for you and it saves you money.”



12. Close the Plan

“For your situation, does monthly or quarterly sound better for you?”



13. If No ? Pivot

“No worries at all—that’s totally fine. Let’s just get you taken care of with a one-time detail.”

“What’s a good day or time for you this week?”



14. Book Appointment

“Perfect, I’ve got you down for [day/time]. Can I get your full name and the best address for the service?”



15. Card on File + Policy

“Perfect, I just need to get a card on file to lock in your appointment. We are NOT charging anything today—this just secures your spot.”

After the card is on file say this disclaimer:

 “We’ll send you reminders, and if you need to cancel just let us know at least 24 hours before. If not, there is a $100 late cancellation fee.”



16. Close / Confirmation

“Awesome, thank you for booking with Revive Detail BR! You can call or text the number that sent you the confirmation message if you need anything at all.”

title: AI Automation Manager
description:
About Green Energy Mechanical



Green Energy Mechanical is a residential HVAC, plumbing, and electrical company serving the Greater Boston market. We have been in business for over 15 years and are building a high-performance company focused on premium service, strong growth, and operational excellence.



We are looking for someone to help us build the future operating system of our business.



This is not a virtual assistant role. This is not a generic chatbot role. This is a systems-building role inside a real operating business.



You will work directly with leadership to streamline workflows, remove bottlenecks, reduce office overhead, improve speed and accountability, and help lay the groundwork for a future SaaS platform for the trades.



Why this role is exciting



You will help optimize a successful home service company from the inside while helping shape systems that may later become software sold to other contractors.



That means your work will have real-world impact immediately:



faster workflows

less wasted time

fewer bottlenecks

better follow-up

stronger reporting

more scalable operations



If you love turning messy operations into clean systems, this is a rare chance to build something meaningful.



What success looks like



In this role, you will help us:



automate repetitive workflows across departments

reduce owner and manager interruptions

streamline sold-job handoffs, purchasing, warehouse coordination, and install prep

improve call center consistency and booking performance

build dashboards and action systems that show what is happening and what to do next

support the internal buildout of AI-powered operational tools that may eventually become a SaaS product for the trades

Responsibilities

Build and maintain automations across ServiceTitan, Slack, Chiirp, Google Workspace, and related tools

Create workflows for sold jobs, ordering, install preparation, follow-up, internal alerts, and customer communications

Help develop internal AI tools that give office staff, field teams, and managers instant answers

Support call center improvement through AI-assisted review, scoring, and workflow enforcement

Build dashboards and action logic tied to KPIs

Improve warehouse and routing workflows so jobs move faster with fewer errors

Document systems in a clear, repeatable way

Identify pain points, propose solutions, and ship improvements quickly

Required skills and software experience

Strong written and spoken English

Strong experience with Make, Zapier, or n8n

Experience with APIs, webhooks, and systems integration

Experience using Slack workflows

Strong working knowledge of Google Sheets and/or Airtable

Comfortable using AI tools such as OpenAI and Claude

Strong process thinking and operational problem solving

Ability to document workflows clearly

Able to overlap with U.S. Eastern Time for meetings and collaboration

title: Freight Forwarding Operations Specialist | CargoWise
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



At DG Air, we’ve specialised in dangerous goods logistics for over 25 years. From transporting hazardous materials across Australia to exporting critical radiopharmaceuticals to New Zealand, we support industries that keep essential global supply chains moving. With strict safety standards, advanced systems, and a strong culture of accountability, our mission is to minimise risk, protect communities, and preserve the environment for future generations.

We are currently seeking experienced Freight Forwarders / Cargo Transport Operators to join our operations support team remotely from the Philippines.



What’s in it for you



• 100% Work From Home (no daily commute)

• Stable long-term employment with an Australian company

• Lower travel costs and better work-life balance

• Real exposure to international freight operations

• Ongoing training and development within a specialist logistics environment



Key Responsibilities



• Managing import and export shipments across air and sea freight from end-to-end, including complete management of shipments

• Preparing and generating all required shipping documentation, such as bookings, bills of lading, airway bills, commercial documents, and regulatory paperwork—not just reviewing or checking

• Coordinating domestic transport movements, including DG shipments via road and air

• Liaising with airlines, shipping lines, transport providers, overseas agents, and internal teams to ensure timely execution of shipments

• Working closely with our Australian-based operations team

• Maintaining accurate and timely data entry in CargoWise

• Tracking shipments and proactively resolving operational issues

• Ensuring compliance with regulatory, documentation, and operational standards





Requirements (Must Have)



• Experience working in a freight forwarding company

• Strong, hands-on experience with CargoWise (essential)

• Proven experience managing shipments end-to-end, including documentation creation (not limited to tracking or coordination)

• Solid understanding of end-to-end freight process, including:

quoting, booking, documentation, customs coordination, and delivery

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy in system work

• Good communication skills and ability to work with international teams

• Reliable, disciplined, and proactive work ethic





Who We’re Looking For



We’re looking for someone who already understands the realities of freight forwarding and is ready for a more stable, remote setup without stepping away from the industry.

If you enjoy structured operations work, take pride in accuracy, and want a long-term role where your experience truly matters, this could be a great fit

title: Full-Time Content Manager for Melbourne-Based Digital Marketing Agency
description:
Position Overview

We're a growing Melbourne-based SEO agency looking for a full-time Content Manager to own our entire SEO content production pipeline — from brief creation through to page indexation.



This is NOT a writing role. You're the person who makes sure everything gets done, done right, and done on time. You'll manage copywriters, coordinate with developers and VAs, QA every piece of content before it goes live, handle client approvals, and keep all dashboards updated throughout.



This is a FULL-TIME position (40 hours per week) with long-term growth potential.



Main Responsibilities

-Build SEO content briefs from assigned keywords

-Manage and chase copywriters to hit deadlines

-Coordinate VA initial QA, then complete your own final review

-Handle client approval rounds and manage revision requests

-Brief developers for publishing and review pages before go-live

-Create and validate schema markup (Service, LocalBusiness, Article, FAQ)

-Submit pages for indexation and monitor via Google Search Console

-Keep Asana and all dashboards updated at every stage of the pipeline



What We're Looking For

-Strong written and spoken English — non-negotiable

-Exceptional attention to detail — you'll be QA'ing content daily and nothing should slip through

-Proven experience managing content production for a digital agency (multiple clients simultaneously)

-Strong content editing eye — you'll be reviewing and QA-ing copy daily so you need to know what good writing looks like, even if you're not the one writing it

-Solid understanding of on-page SEO — internal linking, schema, title tags, H1s, meta descriptions

-Hands-on experience with: Surfer SEO, Asana, Google Drive, WordPress, Originality.ai, ZeroGPT, Grammarly, Google Search Console

-Comfortable working with AI-assisted content workflows (Claude AI, ChatGPT)

-Reliable internet connection and computer

-Must have some overlap with Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST)



What We Offer

-$5–10 USD per hour (40 hours/week = stable monthly income)

-Paid on time, every time (fortnightly or monthly — your choice)

-Direct communication with the agency owner

-Full SOP documentation and training provided

-All tools and access provided

-Long-term stable position with a growing agency



Working Hours

-Full-time: 40 hours per week

-Flexible schedule (we can discuss your preferred hours)

-Must have some overlap with Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST)



To Apply

-Please start your application with the phrase "BLUE MANAGER" — applications without this will not be considered.

Complete our screening form (
)

We will only consider the candidates who submit the form.



In your application, please answer:

-How many clients have you managed content production for simultaneously?

-Walk us through a content pipeline you've owned end-to-end — what did you personally own vs. delegate?



Our Hiring Process

-Review of your application

-Screening form (link below) — only candidates who complete this will be considered

-Short content QA test using our actual workflow

-5-minute video call to assess English speaking skills

-15-minute final interview for selected candidates



Important Notes

-This is NOT project-based work — it's a permanent full-time position

-This is NOT a writing role — you manage the pipeline, not the copy

-You do not need years of SEO experience — but you must understand on-page SEO fundamentals

-We provide full SOP documentation, tools, and training

-Looking to hire immediately for the right person



If you're process-driven, detail-obsessed, and thrive in a fast-moving agency environment — we want to hear from you.

title: Virtual Assistant / Social Media Manager: Women's Health & Beauty Brand (Remote)
description:
Our hook



We sell science, not aesthetics. Our feed is editorial. Our copy is plain. Our claims are defensible.

We don’t run “10% off” graphics; we build a brand the audience respects first and buys from

second. If that sounds like a bad pitch, you’re the wrong fit. If it sounds like a relief, read on.



About the brand



Founded by a Stanford Medicine researcher, our UK-launching women’s health and beauty supplement is a high-end, editorial minimalism, science-first brand.



Audience is 65+ UK, with main demos being Female, and we are popular in Chinese communities.

Stack: Meta Business Suite, TikTok analytics, Canva, CapCut, Notion, Later (or your preferred

scheduler).

The split: - Founder produces: science-led and founder-voice content research summaries,

study explainers, founder talks - You produce: everything else; product, lifestyle, UGC, giveaway

social proof / collab content, community, brand storytelling (~80% of the feed) - You polish, schedule, and publish. Founder hands over drafts; you bring them up to house style and slot them into the calendar. 

You have a library of media assets to draw from which is consistently topped up.



Scope of the engagement

~3 posts/day across Instagram, TikTok,
, YouTube



Quarterly content plans, mapped to funnel stage

Polish and publish founder-supplied science and founder-voice drafts

Community: DMs and comments cleared daily

UGC creator coordination in our target geos (we’ll walk through the mechanics on the call)

Giveaways and collaboration campaigns: 1-2 per quarter

Weekly metrics, monthly readout



What we provide



You won’t be starting from a blank canvas. Day-one access to:

Brand kit — palette, type, logo lockups, tone guide, do’s and don'ts

Media library — product, lifestyle, founder, ingredient stills, indexed and searchable

Templates — post, carousel, story, reel templates aligned to the house style

Prior media — full back catalogue of shipped posts, plus what didn’t work and why

Founder content — delivered as raw drafts and assets; you polish and schedule

The brief is consistency, not invention. We’ve solved the look. You make sure every post lands

inside it.



The mindset



You think a clean, well-structured carousel beats five reactive posts

You’d rather skip a posting day than ship something off-brand

You read the brand kit before you ask questions

You can disagree with a brief in writing and bring evidence



Required



2+ years managing social for a beauty, skincare, supplement, wellness, or femcare brand.

Verifiable client work with portfolio links

Hands-on with the stack above

Portfolio with quantitative metrics — reach, engagement rate, follower growth, conversions where you have them

Stable 25Mbps+ internet, own laptop



Strong preference



Direct experience running giveaways or coordinating UGC creator programs

UK or US wellness/beauty market familiarity



Bonus



Conversational Mandarin or Cantonese

Klaviyo or
-marketing exposure



Engagement terms



$1,200 USD/month flat retainer for the scope above

Paid weekly in USD via Wise or PayPal against invoice

30-day initial engagement, continues monthly thereafter; either side can give 30 days' notice

Rate reviewed every 12 months against growth metrics

Flexible hours. Posts live by 09:00 UK, DMs cleared end-of-day, Friday report. How you organise your day is your call.



Working relationship



Direct line to the founder (Stanford Medicine Research Scientist). 30-min weekly sync; async otherwise via Slack and Notion. Small engagement; your work is visible, your wins are credited.



To apply: ROUND 1



Applications missing any of these will be skipped:

1. Start your reply with the codeword Eternelle 65+

2. Portfolio link with at least two campaigns showing before/after metrics

3. Confirmation that $1,200/mo retainer fits your expectation

4. Any current other commitments



ROUND 2 (shortlist only)



60-second video intro: one beauty/wellness brand you grew, one mistake you made running it

Paid 60-minute test brief: produce one carousel concept against our brand kit, $30 flat

We respond to every Round 1 applicant who submits all four.

title: AI Automation Specialist VA for OBBBA Compliance & Revenue Model
description:
About Our Company: We are building an innovative AI-driven solution, the OBBBA Recurring Revenue Model, designed to transform one-time tax credit opportunities into a continuous, self-funding profit center for businesses. Our model leverages AI for compliance and optimization, helping businesses maximize tax benefits (like FICA-TIP Credit and OBBBA Section 174 provisions), mitigate audit risks, and enhance employee retention. We are looking for a skilled Virtual Assistant to help us implement and manage the technical aspects of this model within our AI platform.



About the Role: We are seeking a highly organized and technically proficient Virtual Assistant with experience in AI automation platforms (specifically our internal AI Automation Library, which we will provide training on) to help us set up, manage, and optimize the OBBBA compliance engine. This role is crucial for ensuring our clients maximize their tax benefits and maintain continuous compliance.



Key Responsibilities:



AI Automation Library Setup & Management:

Configure and manage workflows within our proprietary AI Automation Library.

Design and implement automation sequences for FICA-TIP credit calculations and OBBBA Section 174 tracking.

Set up data ingestion processes from client POS (e.g., Toast, Clover) and payroll (e.g., ADP, Gusto) systems (primarily via data exports initially, with potential for API integration support).

Ensure accurate data mapping and transformation between various data sources.

Compliance & Reporting:

Develop and automate the generation of monthly, quarterly, and annual compliance reports for clients.

Ensure all data tracking and reporting aligns with FICA-TIP and OBBBA Section 174 requirements.

Assist in maintaining meticulous documentation for audit readiness.

System Optimization:

Continuously monitor and optimize automation workflows for efficiency and accuracy.

Troubleshoot any data discrepancies or automation failures.

Suggest improvements to the system based on performance and client feedback.

Technical Support & Documentation:

Create detailed documentation for all automation workflows and processes.

Provide technical support and training to internal team members as needed.

Collaboration:

Work closely with our internal team to refine the OBBBA model and integrate new features.

Communicate effectively regarding project progress, challenges, and solutions.

Required Skills & Experience:



Proven experience with AI automation platforms or similar workflow automation tools. (Specific training on our platform will be provided, but prior experience with Zapier, Make.com, or similar is a plus).

Strong understanding of data integration, ETL processes, and data mapping.

Excellent attention to detail and a commitment to accuracy, especially with financial data.

Ability to understand and implement complex rules and logic for calculations and reporting.

Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

Familiarity with tax compliance, payroll, or POS systems is a significant advantage.

Proactive, self-starter who can work independently and manage multiple tasks.

Preferred Qualifications:



Experience working with financial data or tax-related projects.

Knowledge of FICA-TIP Credit or OBBBA Section 174 provisions (or a strong willingness to learn).

To Apply: Please submit your resume and a cover letter detailing your experience with AI automation platforms and any relevant experience with data integration or financial reporting. In your cover letter, please include the word "blueberry" to show that you have read the entire job description. We would also appreciate examples of past automation projects you have worked on.

title: Outbound Cold Caller — US Market
description:
What This Job Is:

This is a high-volume outbound cold calling role. You will make 80–100 calls per day to US business owners, follow a provided script, and book 20-minute appointments for our founder. That is the entire job.

If you are comfortable on the phone, handle rejection without losing energy, and are motivated by earning more when you perform better — keep reading.

If you are looking for customer service, lead research, or a relaxed work-from-home job — this is not the right fit.



About Us:

We build workflow automation for service businesses in the US. Business owners love it because they stop losing jobs to voi
. We are growing fast and need callers who can get US business owners on the phone and excited about a quick demo.



Your Daily Responsibilities

• Make 80–100 outbound calls per day to US business owners using our provided lead list

• Follow the script, qualify the prospect, and book a 20-minute call with our founder

• Handle objections professionally and stay persistent without being pushy

• Log every call outcome accurately in a shared Google Sheet

• Attend a short daily check-in and flag anything that needs attention



What You Will NOT Do

• Close deals yourself — your only job is to book the appointment

• Research leads — we provide the full contact list

• Do admin, customer service, or account management



What You Earn

Base salary plus performance bonuses. The more you book, the more you earn.



• Base: $300–$400 USD/month depending on experience

• $10 USD for every discovery call that shows up

• $20 USD for every deal that closes after your booked call

• $30 USD bonus if you personally close the deal yourself



What earnings look like in practice:

• Solid month — 20 showed calls + 6 closes + base: ~$670 USD

• Strong month — 40 showed calls + 12 closes + base: ~$1,040 USD

• Top month — 60 showed calls + 18 closes + base: ~$1,360 USD



Payments are bi-weekly via Wise. Base is guaranteed. Bonuses are paid when conditions are met.



What We Are Looking For

• Clear, professional spoken English easily understood by US business owners

• Real outbound cold calling experience — B2B preferred

• Ability to make 80+ calls per day and stay sharp throughout

• Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

• Available during US business hours (Eastern or Central time)

• Honest with call logging — we verify using recorded calls



Tools We Provide

• Full lead list with verified US business owner contact details

• JustCall account with a US phone number — all calls made and recorded through this system

• Call script and objection handling guide

• Google Sheet for daily logging



How to Apply

Your application must include two things. Missing either one means your application will not be reviewed.



1. A 30-second voice introduction

Record yourself saying your name, where you are from, how many years of cold calling experience you have, and one sentence about why you are good on the phone. Upload to Google Drive or Dropbox and share the link.



2. One sentence answering this question

What is the most calls you have made in a single day, and what were you selling?



* Applications without a voice recording will not be considered regardless of experience. This is non-negotiable — your voice is your tool and we need to hear it before we can move forward.



Shortlisted candidates will be sent a second script to record as a final step before an interview.



A Note from the Founder

I run a lean operation and work directly with everyone on the team. If you book good calls and help close deals, I will know your name and you will earn accordingly. There is no cap on what you can make — the more you produce, the more you earn, and the top performers will have first access to better opportunities as we grow.



If that sounds like your kind of environment, I want to hear from you.



- Matt -

title: SEO  and website expert
description:
Our SEO agency is expanding and we're searching for an expert-level SEO professional to become part of our team on a long-term basis. Your role will include managing comprehensive SEO strategies and implementing website optimizations across various client accounts. We need someone experienced – this position requires deep SEO expertise combined with practical website development skills.



**What You'll Do:**

- Execute comprehensive On-Page optimization strategies

- Develop and implement Off-Page SEO campaigns

- Handle all Technical SEO requirements and fixes

- Make website adjustments and technical modifications as needed

- Manage SEO for several clients at the same time

- Translate and optimize content using tools like DEEPL

- Drive tangible improvements in search rankings and organic traffic

- Provide clear updates and execute tasks according to specifications



**What We're Looking For:**

- Deep understanding of all SEO disciplines (On-Page, Off-Page, Technical)

- Hands-on experience with website development (HTML, CSS, WordPress, and similar)

- Demonstrable success stories with real SEO growth

- Self-motivated with excellent time management skills

- Dedicated to achieving results for every client you work with

- Interested in building a lasting professional relationship, not just short-term contracts



**Start your application with your favorite animal so we know you've carefully read through everything**



**How We Pay:**



Our compensation model works as follows:

- **Initial phase:** We start with a trial rate during the first several weeks while we evaluate compatibility and output quality

- **Post-trial:** Your rate will increase based on how well you perform, the trust you build, your work quality, and the results you deliver

- Opportunities for continued advancement as our agency grows



**Critical Note:**



We're exclusively interested in professionals who have mastered every aspect of SEO and possess the technical capabilities to modify websites. If you're not confident handling complete SEO management for clients PLUS website implementation work, this role isn't the right match.



This opportunity is designed for someone seeking stable, ongoing work with room for professional development – not a one-off project.



**How to Apply:**



Share your background, any measurable outcomes from past work (if you have them), and explain what makes you an ideal candidate.

title: Property Manager Assistant
description:
**Property Manager **

**If you do not have experience in property management, no need to apply**



Location: Remote (Central Standard Time Zone)



Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 4:30 pm CST



About Us:

We are a dynamic and growing real estate investment and property management firm. We strive to provide top-notch services to our clients and tenants while maximizing investment returns. We are seeking an experienced and proactive Virtual Assistant to support our administrative and property management tasks.



Position Overview:

The Virtual Assistant will be responsible for a variety of administrative duties, including running background checks, managing social media content, handling lease renewals, and more. The ideal candidate will have at least 2 years of experience in real estate, specifically in property management. They must be proficient in English and able to work within the Central Time Zone, with access to make calls to the US.

Background Checks: Conduct background checks for prospective tenants.

, Instagram, and YouTube; manage engagement and grow our online presence.

Manage lease renewals.

Coordinate the signing of new leases through e-signature platforms.

Vacancy Management: Post vacancies on relevant platforms and manage inquiries.

Waitlist Creation: Develop and maintain a waitlist of prospective tenants.

Rent Tracking and Billing: Track late rent payments, update late fees and other additional fees/bills as needed.

Monthly Reporting: Provide monthly KPI reports on vacancies, late rent, fees, and other relevant metrics.

Small Claims Support: Create exhibits and forms for small claims related to money judgments and/or late rent.



Required Qualifications:

Minimum of 2 years’ experience in real estate, specifically in property management.

Proficiency with Baselane, Google Docs (Excel and Word),
, Instagram, YouTube, TidyCal scheduling, and SiteBuilder.

Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills.

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

Ability to handle multiple tasks and meet deadlines effectively.



Preferred Qualifications:

Previous experience creating social media strategy and content.



Benefits:

Remote work opportunity with flexible work-from-home arrangements.

Opportunity to work with a growing and dynamic real estate firm.

Competitive compensation based on experience.



Application Process: Interested candidates should submit their resume and a cover letter detailing their relevant experience and why they are the perfect fit for this position. Interviews will be conducted virtually.

title: Job Title: Performance-Based Short-Form Video Editor (All Platforms)
description:
We are building a small team of editors to clip and transform livestream content into high-performing short-form videos.



Our content is already proven:



120M+ total views

70M+ accounts reached

500K–1M average views per video



Your job is simple: take longform livestream footage and turn it into concise, engaging, high-retention clips with strong hooks that perform.



Compensation Structure:



Starts at $50 dollars per 1,000,000 views on YouTube and
. After successful trial month, this will increase

based on output

Views counted within the first 7 days

No cap on earnings

Consistent output = scalable income



Workload Expectations:



Produce 1–5 clips per day

Minimum expectation: 1 high-quality post daily



Responsibilities:



Identify high-potential moments from livestream content

Edit into tight, structured short-form clips

Fast turnaround and consistency

title: Experienced Social Media & Content Operations Specialist (GoHighLevel + YouTube + Podcast Editing)
description:

This is not a “post random content and hope it performs” role — we are focused on consistency, clarity, and using content to generate strategy conversations and booked calls.



You will be working directly inside an established content workflow. We create the content and messaging direction — your role is to ensure everything is professionally executed, published on time, and distributed correctly across platforms.



We are not focused on virality. We are focused on precision, consistency, and content that supports long-term business growth.



Core Responsibilities:



Manage and execute social media posting across platforms using GoHighLevel (primary scheduling system)

Ensure consistent publishing cadence across all channels

Upload, optimize, and manage YouTube content (titles, descriptions, scheduling, organization)

Edit weekly podcast episodes for publishing (clean cuts, audio clarity, basic structure)

Edit instructional and talking-head business videos for distribution

Repurpose long-form content into platform-ready assets when direction is provided

Maintain consistency in formatting, branding, and posting standards across all channels

Ensure content is published accurately and on schedule without oversight



What Success Looks Like:



Content is consistently published without reminders

YouTube channel is organized, active, and professionally maintained

Podcast episodes are delivered cleanly and on schedule

Social media is consistently active with correctly formatted posts

Minimal back-and-forth required — execution is reliable and proactive



Required Experience:



Strong experience in social media content scheduling and execution

Experience using GoHighLevel (or similar CRM/scheduling platforms at a high level)

Proven video editing experience (podcast and/or talking-head content preferred)

Experience managing YouTube channels (uploads, optimization, publishing workflow)

Ability to manage recurring content workflows independently

High attention to detail and consistency



Strong Plus (Not Required):



Experience working with coaches, consultants, or online education businesses

Understanding of YouTube SEO and packaging (titles, thumbnails, retention basics)

Familiarity with podcast distribution platforms (Spotify, Apple Podcasts, etc.)

Experience repurposing long-form content into multiple short-form assets



How We Work:



We provide:



All raw content (video, podcast recordings, etc.)

Copy direction or talking points

Clear expectations for timing and output



You are responsible for:



Execution across all platforms

Maintaining publishing consistency

Ensuring content is clean, formatted, and correctly delivered

Owning the operational side of content distribution



This is a long-term role for someone who is highly organized, experienced with content workflows, and comfortable being the execution layer behind a fast-moving content system.



To Apply:



Please include:



A summary of your experience with content operations (not just editing or posting)

Examples of YouTube channels, podcasts, or social accounts you’ve managed or supported

Your experience with GoHighLevel or similar systems

title: Healthcare Marketing & Lead Generation Virtual Assistant
description:
About Us



Care Within Reach is a growing pediatric home health agency based in Georgia, USA. We provide skilled nursing and personal care support to medically fragile children through the state-funded Georgia Pediatric Program (GAPP). Our mission is to connect families of children with complex medical needs to life-changing in-home care services — at no cost to the family.



We are building a dedicated marketing team and need a sharp, self-motivated Virtual Assistant to serve as the engine of our digital outreach and lead generation efforts.



What You'll Do



Digital Community Engagement (40% of time)

You will identify, join, and actively engage in
 groups across Georgia that serve families of children with special needs. These include groups focused on cerebral palsy, muscular dystrophy, hydrocephalus, autism, spina bifida, and general special needs parenting. Your engagement must be authentic and value-driven — answering questions, sharing resources, and building trust before introducing our services.



Lead Research & Database Building (25% of time)

You will build and maintain a comprehensive database of referral sources in the Atlanta, Georgia metropolitan area. This includes pediatric physical therapy offices, pediatricians, hospital case managers, special education coordinators, and advocacy organizations. You will research contact information, map locations, and identify decision-makers.



LinkedIn &
 Outreach (20% of time)

You will conduct professional outreach to hospital discharge planners, social workers, and case managers via LinkedIn and
. The goal is to introduce Care Within Reach and schedule introductory meetings for our field team. You will draft personalized messages, manage follow-up sequences, and track responses.



Event Research & Calendar Management (10% of time)

You will continuously monitor and update a calendar of relevant events in Georgia where our target families gather. This includes Special Olympics events, disability expos, health fairs, NICU reunions, and advocacy workshops. You will research vendor booth opportunities and registration deadlines.



Social Media & Content Posting (5% of time)

You will manage the company's
 page and Google My Business profile, posting educational content about the GAPP program, sharing testimonials (with permission), and responding to inquiries.



Requirements



Must-Have:



•

Excellent written English (you will be communicating with American families and professionals)



•

Experience in lead generation, cold outreach, or social media marketing



•

Proficiency with
, LinkedIn, Google Sheets/Excel, and CRM tools



•

Strong research skills and attention to detail



•

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



•

Available to work during U.S. Eastern Time business hours (at least 4-hour overlap)



Nice-to-Have:



•

Previous experience in healthcare, home health, or Medicaid-related industries



•

Familiarity with the U.S. healthcare system



•

Experience with paid advertising 
 Ads Manager, Google Ads)



•

Canva or basic graphic design skills for social media posts



What We Offer



•

Stable, long-term full-time position (this is not a short-term project)



•

Opportunity to grow into a Marketing Coordinator role as the team expands



•

Meaningful work — you are directly helping families of medically fragile children access free care



•

Performance bonuses tied to qualified leads generated



•

Paid Philippine holidays after 3 months



How to Apply



Please send your application with:



1.Your resume/CV



2.A brief cover letter (2-3 paragraphs) explaining why you're a great fit



3.Examples of previous lead generation or social media marketing work (screenshots, links, or descriptions)



4.Your available working hours in U.S. Central Time



We will respond to qualified applicants within 48 hours.

title: Senior Operations Executive (Live Music Agency)
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines Based) 

Compensation: 450 PHP per hour | Paid via Wise 

Schedule: 25 hours per week (Fixed 10 am – 3 pm UK Time) 

Reporting to: Agency Director

The Opportunity

We are a premier UK-based live music agency looking for a high-caliber Operations Executive to serve as the backbone of our business. This is not a task-based "assistant" role; it is a position for a seasoned professional who can manage complex workflows, liaise with senior stakeholders, and maintain operational excellence with minimal supervision.

We are looking for a "Right Hand" who can anticipate needs, manage the Director’s priorities, and ensure our events and finances are handled with surgical precision.

Critical Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Experience: Minimum 5+ years of experience in Operations, Executive Support, or high-end BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) management roles.

Communication: Near-native English fluency (written and verbal). You must be confident representing the agency on video calls with UK clients and industry partners.

Tech Stack: Advanced proficiency with G-Suite, Notion (or other task management software such as Trello, or Monday,com) , and Xero (invoicing/reconciliation).

Niche Skill (Plus): Direct experience with Music Management software—specifically Bandpencil—is a significant advantage.

Mindset: A "results-over-hours" mentality. You are highly autonomous and comfortable working in a high-stakes environment.

Core Responsibilities

Operations Management: Lead the day-to-day logistics, coordinating between the Director, and Events Manager.

Client & Artist Relations: Act as a primary point of contact for enquiries, contract management, and logistics.

Financial Oversight: Manage all invoicing through Xero and ensure financial data is ready for the accountants.

Executive Inbox Management: Occasionally manage the Director’s
, triaging urgent matters and handling personal administrative tasks to a high standard.

Process Improvement: Identify bottlenecks in our current workflow and implement systems to solve them.

Benefits & Culture

Premium Pay: 450 PHP/hour reflects our commitment to hiring top-tier talent.

Direct Relationship: You will work directly with the business owner, not through a middle-man agency.

Flexibility: While the 10 am – 3 pm UK window is required for team syncs, we offer a high degree of autonomy and flexibility for the right person.



How to Apply (Strict Selection Process)

We are only looking for the top 1% of applicants. To be considered, please provide:

Video Assessment: A 2-minute video introduction (Loom or unlisted YouTube link). In this video, please detail your experience in high-end BPO or operational management and explain how you handle high-pressure deadlines. Applications without a video will be automatically disqualified.

Professional Summary: A brief overview of your experience with G-Suite, Notion, Xero, and/or music management software.

Stability: Confirmation that you have a stable, high-speed internet connection and a quiet environment for client video calls during UK business hours.
salary: 450 PHP per hour | Paid via Wise

title: Stock Management Admin (Big Seller)
description:
Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



Key Responsibilities:



- Take ownership of the BigSeller account. Ensure "Available Stock" is perfectly synced across all stores to eliminate the risk of overselling during high-traffic mega-campaigns (11.11, 12.12).

- Manage the Inbound/Outbound process within BigSeller, including Stock-In (purchases), Stock-Out (promos/damage), and Warehouse Transfers.

- Lead weekly or monthly cycle counts and reconcile physical warehouse counts with BigSeller’s "On-Hand" data and resolve discrepancies between "On Hand," "Available," and "Reserved" stock.

- Use BigSeller’s "Purchase Suggestions" and historical sales data to forecast stock needs. Ensure we never hit "Zero Stock" on hero products.

- Create and track POs within BigSeller. Verify that "Stock-In" quantities match supplier invoices and update Costs to keep COGS accurate.

- Inspect returned items, update stock status and process replacements.

- Create SKU of new products and inform the ecom team for listing.

- Monitors stock sync between Bigseller and URStore.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and provide ad-hoc support.



Qualifications:



- 2–4 years of hands-on experience managing a Bigseller Account (Stocks, Inventory, Purchase, Finance) or similar is required.

- Proven experience using BigSeller ERP (specifically the Stock Management, Report, and Purchase modules) is highly preferred.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Strong numeracy for calculating weighted average costs and reconciling bulk shipments.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



Benefits:



- Stable full time with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Opportunity to be part of a growing team and Korean Beauty Brands.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore during events.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as the Philippines.

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you!
