title: Job Title: Cold Caller / Lead Generation Closer
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-Time



Compensation:



* $640 USD/month (base salary)

* + $20 USD per qualified booked appointment

* Performance-based incentives (uncapped potential)





About the Role



We’re looking for a confident and results-driven Cold Caller / Lead Generation Closer who can turn conversations into qualified appointments. You’ll be speaking with international clients, identifying opportunities, and booking calls for our sales team.



You’ll also be working inside GoHighLevel (GHL) to manage leads, track conversations, and schedule appointments.





Key Responsibilities



* Conduct outbound cold calls to potential clients

* Qualify leads and identify decision-makers

* Clearly present our services and value proposition

* Handle objections and keep conversations moving forward

* Book qualified appointments and update them in GHL

* Maintain accurate call logs, notes, and follow-ups in the CRM

* Meet or exceed daily and weekly KPIs





Requirements



* Excellent English communication skills (clear, confident, and professional)

* Proven experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or appointment setting

* Strong objection-handling and persuasion skills

* Goal-oriented with a consistent track record of hitting targets

* Comfortable working in a remote setup





Nice to Have



* Experience using GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM tools

* Background in B2B sales or lead generation

* Experience working with US or international clients





What We Offer



* Stable base salary + performance incentives

* Fully remote work environment

* Structured workflow and clear targets

* Opportunity to grow into a full sales/closing role

* Training on GHL and internal processes





Who This Role Is For



This is for someone who:



* Is confident speaking with international prospects

* Can think on their feet and handle objections smoothly

* Is driven by results and performance-based earnings

* Wants long-term growth in sales

title: Recruiting & Onboarding Assistant (Support to Recruiting Manager)
description:
Recruiting & Onboarding Assistant

Full-Time | Remote | TimeProof Required | GoHighLevel + ATS Experience Required



We are a U.S.-based commercial services company building a structured, accountable internal hiring and onboarding operation. We are hiring a strong Recruiting & Onboarding Assistant to support our Recruiting Manager and help keep recruiting workflows, candidate communication, onboarding steps, and documentation fully organized, accurate, and moving forward.



This is not a basic assistant role.

This is not a passive support position.



We need someone who is highly organized, process-driven, detail-focused, and capable of taking ownership of recruiting coordination, onboarding follow-up, system updates, and documentation control. The right person must be able to keep things on track, maintain clean records, and step in with confidence when structure is needed.



This role is execution-focused and requires strong follow-through, responsiveness, and the ability to help take pressure off leadership by managing the details correctly.



Core Responsibilities



1) Recruiting Support

	•	Post and maintain job ads across platforms

	•	Source applicants through job boards, databases, and social channels

	•	Review resumes and complete initial screening steps

	•	Schedule interviews and maintain clear candidate notes

	•	Manage candidate follow-ups by SMS,
, and phone inside GoHighLevel

	•	Keep candidates moving through the pipeline with accurate statuses and timely follow-up

	•	Help ensure no qualified candidate is left sitting without action



2) Onboarding Support

	•	Coordinate onboarding steps from start to finish

	•	Send required forms, links, and instructions and confirm completion

	•	Communicate expectations, next steps, and start details clearly

	•	Track onboarding and training progress in GoHighLevel and the ATS

	•	Follow up on missing items until everything is complete

	•	Confirm readiness before candidates are activated, scheduled, or cleared forward



3) Compliance and Documentation

	•	Collect and organize W-9/W-4 forms, IDs, licenses, certifications, and required onboarding documents

	•	Store files correctly and maintain complete digital records

	•	Keep tags, tasks, notes, and checklists accurate and up to date

	•	Help ensure all files are complete, organized, and audit-ready

	•	Identify missing documentation quickly and follow through until resolved



4) Client and Candidate Communication

	•	Make calls as needed to confirm interview availability, onboarding status, scheduling, start requirements, and hiring needs

	•	Communicate professionally with both candidates and internal stakeholders

	•	Document outcomes, next steps, and follow-up actions inside the system

	•	Help keep communication clear, timely, and organized across the process



5) Process Support and SOP Execution

	•	Maintain and update SOPs, checklists, and recruiting/onboarding workflows

	•	Help improve workflow structure by documenting what is working and what is being missed

	•	Create and maintain templates for repeatable steps such as follow-ups, checklists, and candidate messaging

	•	Support the Recruiting Manager by helping bring consistency and order to day-to-day execution



6) Systems Coordination and Reporting

	•	Keep pipelines, tasks, follow-ups, notes, and statuses current in GoHighLevel

	•	Maintain ATS accuracy and ensure candidate records are up to date

	•	Provide weekly updates and status reporting to the Recruiting Manager

	•	Help ensure nothing is missed, delayed, or left incomplete

	•	Be capable of stepping in and keeping operations moving when the manager is unavailable or overloaded



What We Need in This Role



We are looking for someone who can do more than just assist. This person needs to be strong enough to help hold the process together, keep workflows clean, and take over key coordination tasks without constant hand-holding.



The right candidate must be:

	•	Highly organized

	•	Strong in follow-up

	•	Detail-focused

	•	Comfortable with structure and process

	•	Confident handling communication by phone,
, and text

	•	Able to keep multiple moving parts organized at once

	•	Reliable, responsive, and consistent

	•	Capable of taking initiative when something is missing or off track



Required Experience



You must already have hands-on experience with:

	•	GoHighLevel, including pipelines, tags, tasks, notes, forms, and workflows

	•	An ATS or recruiting CRM such as Zoho Recruit, CEIPAL, Bullhorn, Tracker, JobAdder, or similar

	•	Google Workspace, including Docs and Sheets

	•	Recruiting support, onboarding coordination, or hiring operations

	•	Documentation tracking and file organization

	•	Candidate communication and scheduling



Non-Negotiables

	•	Strong organization and follow-through

	•	Clear spoken and written English

	•	Comfortable with phone communication

	•	Able to follow defined processes and maintain clean records

	•	Reliable, responsive, and consistent during EST work hours

	•	TimeProof tracking required

	•	Must already understand how to work inside systems without creating confusion or missed steps



Schedule and Tracking

	•	Full-time, 40 hours per week

	•	Weekly meeting plus quick check-ins as needed

	•	TimeProof required, including screenshots and activity logs



To Apply



All 3 items below are required. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



1) Video Introduction (2 to 4 minutes)



Please cover:

	•	Your recruiting or onboarding background

	•	Your experience with GoHighLevel

	•	Your ATS experience

	•	Your experience with candidate communication and phone follow-up

	•	Your documentation and onboarding process experience

	•	An example of a checklist, SOP, or workflow you have supported or maintained



2) Resume



3) Systems List



Please list the tools and systems you have personally used.

title: REMOTE OPERATIONS DIRECTOR  (GoHighLevel + Cleaning/Janitorial / Facility Operations Background Required)
description:
REMOTE OPERATIONS DIRECTOR



(Executive-Level | GoHighLevel + Automation Systems + Commercial Cleaning / Facility Operations Required)



Schedule: Monday–Thursday | 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST

Type: Full-Time | Long-Term

Tracking: TimeProof required during all working hours





ROLE OVERVIEW



We are hiring a Remote Operations Director to take full ownership of execution, systems, team performance, and profitability across Sales Support, Marketing Systems, and Operations.



This is an executive operations role—not a task-based VA position.



You will be responsible for:

	•	Building and enforcing structure

	•	Managing people and performance

	•	Designing and maintaining automation systems

	•	Ensuring the company operates efficiently, predictably, and profitably



You will serve as the operational bridge between:

	•	Cold Callers / SDRs

	•	Marketing

	•	Estimating

	•	Field Operations



You own outcomes, not activity.





CRITICAL REQUIREMENT (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



You must know how to personally build, implement, and troubleshoot automation systems.



This is not a “manage a developer” role.



You are expected to:

	•	Build workflows yourself

	•	Fix issues yourself

	•	Improve systems continuously





PRIOR EXECUTIVE EXPERIENCE (REQUIRED)



This role requires prior senior leadership experience, such as:

	•	Operations Director

	•	Head of Operations

	•	Senior Operations Manager

	•	Business Operations Lead

	•	COO / Deputy Operations



You must demonstrate measurable improvements in:

	•	Organization

	•	Profitability

	•	Team performance

	•	Systems efficiency

	•	Revenue or contract growth





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1) KPI OWNERSHIP & EXECUTION

	•	Own company KPIs across:

	•	Sales

	•	Marketing

	•	Operations

	•	Run structured weekly performance meetings

	•	Identify bottlenecks and underperformance

	•	Take immediate corrective action

	•	Deliver executive KPI reports including:

	•	Metrics

	•	Gaps

	•	Root causes

	•	Action plans





2) OPERATIONS, SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION (BUILD + OWN)



You are responsible for the entire automation and systems infrastructure.



Platforms include:

	•	GoHighLevel

	•	Zapier

	•	Additional tools such as Make (formerly Integromat) or n8n (strongly preferred)





You will:



BUILD (Hands-On)

	•	Design and build automation workflows from scratch

	•	Create multi-step logic including:

	•	Filters

	•	Paths

	•	Conditions

	•	Webhooks

	•	Build lead routing, tagging, and assignment systems

	•	Build follow-up automation 
, SMS, tasking)

	•	Build deduplication logic before CRM entry





MANAGE & OPTIMIZE

	•	Maintain and improve all workflows

	•	Monitor for failures, delays, and data issues

	•	Optimize for:

	•	Speed

	•	Accuracy

	•	Cost efficiency

	•	Eliminate manual work wherever possible





SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE

	•	Design scalable systems that support:

	•	High-volume lead flow

	•	Multi-location operations

	•	Multiple service lines (cleaning + staffing)

	•	Ensure all systems are:

	•	Documented

	•	Reliable

	•	Easy for the team to follow





TROUBLESHOOTING (CRITICAL)

	•	Identify and fix:

	•	Broken automations

	•	Missing leads

	•	Duplicate data

	•	Sync issues

	•	Implement backup logic and fail-safes





3) TEAM MANAGEMENT & ACCOUNTABILITY

	•	Oversee remote team execution (4–10+ tea
mbers)

	•	Assign tasks and enforce deadlines

	•	Verify completion and output quality

	•	Run daily and weekly check-ins

	•	Maintain performance tracking and documentation



You are not the follow-up person you ensure follow-up happens.





4) PROPOSAL COORDINATION & SUBMISSION



(Not Full Estimating)

	•	Coordinate with estimators to ensure proposals are:

	•	Accurate

	•	Complete

	•	On-time

	•	Professionally packaged

	•	Review:

	•	Scope

	•	Pricing summaries

	•	Compliance documents

	•	Manage:

	•	RFPs

	•	Bid submissions

	•	Vendor portals

	•	Maintain organized records:

	•	COIs

	•	Safety documents

	•	Contracts



5) MARKETING & LEAD FOLLOW-THROUGH

	•	Own all lead follow-up systems inside GHL

	•	Ensure:

	•	No lead is missed

	•	No pipeline is stagnant

	•	Monitor:

	•	Speed to lead

	•	Follow-up compliance

	•	Conversion rates

	•	Ensure all inbound and outbound systems are connected and functioning





6) ADMINISTRATIVE, COMPLIANCE & FINANCIAL SUPPORT

	•	Maintain vendor registrations and compliance deadlines

	•	Track invoicing, payments, and cost summaries

	•	Ensure all submissions are accurate and on time





REQUIRED EXPERIENCE & SKILLS

	•	Advanced experience with GoHighLevel

	•	Strong hands-on experience with Zapier (multi-step workflows, paths, webhooks)

	•	Experience building automation systems (not just using templates)

	•	Experience with Make or n8n (preferred)

	•	Experience with CRM + automation integration across multiple tools

	•	Commercial cleaning, janitorial, facility services, or construction admin background

	•	Proven remote team leadership

	•	Strong organizational and execution skills

	•	Executive-level communication





NOT A FIT IF

	•	You have only used Zapier for basic automations

	•	You cannot build workflows from scratch

	•	You rely fully on developers for technical setup

	•	You do not understand webhooks or data flow

	•	You prefer task-based work vs ownership





FIRST 90-DAY PERFORMANCE METRICS

	•	Fully built and documented automation systems (GHL + Zapier + integrations)

	•	Zero critical lead loss or automation failure

	•	Weekly KPI reporting across all departments

	•	Minimum 5 active proposals submitted weekly

	•	Measurable improvement in:

	•	Lead response time

	•	Pipeline movement

	•	Conversion rates

	•	Documented system improvements and efficiencies





REQUIRED APPLICATION SUBMISSIONS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



1) VIDEO (5–10 MINUTES)



Explain:

	•	Your executive operations experience

	•	How you improved systems and profitability

	•	How you manage teams and accountability





2) 30–60–90 DAY PLAN



Provide:

	•	How you will organize operations

	•	How you will improve systems and automation

	•	How you will measure success





3) PROOF OF RESULTS

	•	Metrics, case studies, or screenshots showing impact





4) AUTOMATION SYSTEM BREAKDOWN (MANDATORY)



Show a real system you built:



Include:

	•	Lead flow (source ? processing ? CRM ? follow-up)

	•	Tools used

	•	Logic structure

	•	How you handled:

	•	Duplicates

	•	Errors

	•	Delays



If you cannot show this, do not apply.



COMPENSATION & GROWTH

	•	Competitive monthly compensation

	•	Performance-based bonuses tied to KPIs

	•	Growth path toward Senior Operations / COO-level leadership







FINAL POSITIONING

title: Social Media & Funnel Specialist (B2B)   Long-Term, GoHighLevel
description:
Social Media & Funnel Specialist  B2B Services (Remote, Part-time About the Role

We’re a U.S.-based B2B services company operating across staffing and commercial services. We’re hiring a hands-on social media and funnel specialist to run our content engine, build our lead-gen funnels in GoHighLevel, and drive qualified leads into our pipeline.

This is a long-term role with a clear path into a senior growth position as the business scales. You’ll own the full content-to-pipeline loop — not just post on social media, not just build pages — the entire system from first impression to booked call.



What You’ll Own

Social Media Growth

	?	Content production and posting across LinkedIn,
, and Instagram

	?	4–6 reels and 8–12 carousels or flyers per week

	?	Daily LinkedIn engagement with decision-makers in our target accounts

	?	All scheduled and published through GoHighLevel

Funnels & Automation (GoHighLevel)

	?	Build and optimize landing pages and lead capture forms

	?	Configure SMS and
 follow-up sequences

	?	Set up AI workflows for lead response and booking

	?	Own the full path: content ? funnel ? pipeline ? booked call

Website & SEO

	?	Service page updates and refreshes

	?	On-page SEO (titles, meta descriptions, keywords)

	?	CTA alignment between ads, content, and landing pages

Reporting

	?	Weekly performance review: lead volume, funnel conversion rates, content performance

	?	Surface what’s working, kill what isn’t



Required

	?	B2B social media or growth marketing experience

	?	Strong working knowledge of Canva and CapCut (or equivalent)

	?	Strong English copywriting — Hook ? Value ? CTA structure

	?	Organized, takes ownership, communicates clearly without hand-holding

Preferred

	?	GoHighLevel platform experience

	?	Funnel building experience (any platform GHL, ClickFunnels, HubSpot)

	?	LinkedIn inbound and outbound experience

	?	Background in service businesses, staffing, or recruiting



Compensation

	?	$575/month base, paid weekly via Wise

	?	Performance bonuses tied to qualified lead volume and funnel conversion rates

	?	part-time, 5 hours/day, with overlap on U.S. Eastern Time



How to Apply

Send the following:

	1.	Confirmation you’ll use TimeProof from day one

	2.	A 2-minute intro video  who you are, what you’ve built, and one result you’re proud of

	3.	One or two samples of funnels or content you’ve created

Applications without all three pieces won’t be reviewed.

- Reliable, punctual, and able to work independently

title: Music Audio Assistant
description:
PLEASE READ TO ENSURE YOU QUALIFY:



I am looking for a person that is a expert in R&B & Pop music production, doing various tasks. Below are things you will need to know how to do and you will already need to have access to the softwares. You'd be working on call anytime Mon-Sun if needed. Some days/weeks there will be work, some days there won't but you will be paid either way. If you had no work you will be paid half if you had any work you will be paid full.



You will need to know how to handle vocal extraction & production Reconstruction this includes vocal cleanup, beat reconstruction, mix & master (if necessary). You will also be responsible for uploading songs to distrokid and handling making sure the lyrics show on Apple Music and are syncing (this part you can learn via Youtube if you are unsure).

iZotope RX 12

Suno (moving around hooks, fixing phrasing and/or verses) 

Removing Suno Metadata to Metadata just mentioning the artist name and song

FL Studio or Logic to recreate beats or create original beats if needed

Uploading Songs to DistroKid

Adding a Suno Feature (with the voice I tell you) to a real human song or beat and making it sound natural.

title: Business Manager (Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a Business Operations Manager to help drive the day-to-day functions of a fast-growing creative media and marketing studio. This position plays a key role in keeping operations organized, efficient, and scalable by managing systems, coordinating projects, and supporting leadership initiatives.



The right candidate is proactive, highly organized, and experienced in startup or agency environments. You should be comfortable handling multiple priorities, building processes from the ground up, and contributing to both operational execution and strategic efforts.



Key Responsibilities



Operations & Systems (Primary Focus)

-Develop, refine, and maintain internal workflows and systems

-Ensure processes are efficient, scalable, and well-documented

-Keep project and team documentation organized and up to date



Project Management

-Monitor project timelines, tasks, and deliverables

-Work closely with different teams to ensure seamless execution

-Utilize tools such as Notion, Asana, or similar platforms for tracking



Financial Coordination

-Manage invoicing, expense tracking, and basic bookkeeping activities

-Assist with budget monitoring and simple financial reporting

-Ensure all financial records are accurate and properly maintained



Administrative & HR Support

-Support onboarding and offboarding processes

-Maintain internal files and documentation

-Coordinate with contractors, including payments and logistics



Reporting & Internal Communication

-Prepare regular operational reports (weekly/monthly)

-Identify potential risks, inefficiencies, and improvement areas

title: Senior WordPress Web Developer & Designer (Figma, Elementor, SEO, Coding)
description:
I'm looking for a highly reliable, detail-oriented web designer and developer to work with me on an ongoing basis. This is a long-term role for someone who takes equal pride in the visual and technical sides of building websites.



Design eye is the most important factor in this hire. Many developers can build sites. Very few can design at the level I need. My work sits across two brands: 
 (strategy, systems, automations, brand, and websites) and Relier House (a premium imprint for full website builds, branding, and SEO, with an editorial, quiet luxury feel). Both rely on intentional design. Fonts, colours, layout, hierarchy, spacing, white space, and CTAs all matter. Sites must look considered, feel premium, and convert.



You'll need to be confident in Figma, Elementor / WordPress, Shopify, front-end coding, and on-page and technical SEO. Just as important, you should be able to take a brief and bring real design thinking to it, not just translate someone else's mockups.



Who I am:

I'm Maddi Irving, a solo business consultant and designer based on Sydney's Northern Beaches. I work with growing service-based businesses on strategy, systems, automations, brand, and websites. 



The process you'll follow on every web build:

Understand the brief. Review brand guidelines, copy, sitemap, and any reference material. Ask questions before starting.

Design in Figma. Create full mockups for every page, desktop and mobile. Set up the type system, colour styles, spacing, and components properly so the file is clean and reusable. Designs go through approval before any development begins.

Develop in Elementor or Shopify. Build the approved Figma designs into pixel-perfect, mobile-responsive sites. Set up site structure, style settings, custom code where needed, SEO, and any automations or backend workflows.



Key responsibilities:

Take briefs and translate them into considered Figma mockups that reflect the brand

Design full sites in Figma (desktop and mobile) before any development begins

Build approved designs into custom WordPress sites using Elementor, or into Shopify where required

Work across other platforms where required (Divi, WP Bakery, Showit, Squarespace, Wix)

Set up site structure properly from the start (style settings, spacing, responsive layout)

Code custom elements as needed (HTML, CSS, PHP, Liquid)

Implement strong on-page SEO (technical and content-based)

Set up automations, funnels, and clean backend workflows

Troubleshoot bugs and optimise performance

Communicate via Slack and manage tasks in Asana



Skills required:

Figma (advanced, including auto-layout, components, and clean file setup)

Elementor and WordPress (advanced)

Shopify (intermediate to advanced)

HTML, CSS, PHP (intermediate to advanced)

SEO (technical knowledge and implementation experience)

Strong visual design skills with a focus on clean, modern, editorial, brand-aligned layouts

Excellent written and spoken English

Bonus if you have experience with WooCommerce, Zapier, Make, or ClickFunnels



Soft skills:

Reliable and consistent (non-negotiable, this is an ongoing role and I need someone who shows up)

Detail-focused with strong quality control

Proactive and organised

Clear communicator who can manage workload independently



Rate: AUD $16 to $22 per hour, depending on experience, dedication, and reliability.

To apply: Please send a portfolio of websites you've designed and built yourself, not just developed from someone else's mockups. I want to see your Figma design work and the live sites that came from it. If you can share a Figma file you've set up from scratch, even better.

title: Tech Stack Developer
description:
About the Group

This role sits across two growing Australian businesses that share an operations and technology backbone, and that are scaling at the same time.

Nexia Health Care is a multi-site healthcare provider delivering specialist assessment and treatment services including ADHD, ASD, and endocrinology pathways. Nexia serves clients through both Foundational (FND) and Comprehensive (COMP) programs, spanning initial psychology consultations, specialist appointments, medication management, and ongoing therapeutic programs such as DBT.

FINR Advisory is a financial advisory firm offering finance brokers, property planning and a buyers agency within the one group. The practice runs structured client journeys from initial discovery through statement of advice, implementation, and ongoing review and relies on tightly integrated CRM, document management, and compliance systems to do that well.

As both businesses scale, they need robust technology to manage their respective client journeys end-to-end, and a shared analytics layer that gives leadership a single view of operations across the group.



The Opportunity

You will be the dedicated developer supporting both Nexia and FINR on their separate technology and integration journeys, reporting directly to the MD. The team will provide hands-on training, technical direction, and mentorship as you build and maintain the systems that power day-to-day operations across both businesses.

This is a high-impact role where you will work across the full stack — from data integration and API development to dashboard building and workflow automation — with deep exposure to two very different operating contexts: healthcare delivery and financial advisory.



Key Responsibilities

Deliverable Across Both Businesses

Dashboard Development & Data Visualisation

• Maintain and extend operational dashboards covering client pipelines, practitioner and adviser capacity, revenue analytics, and SLA tracking

• Build reporting views that combine data from both businesses where useful for leadership, while keeping client and operational data appropriately separated

• Develop visualisations for capacity planning (booked vs. available), backlog estimates, and conversion funnels

• Ensure data quality across both environments by resolving issues with duplicate records, merged profiles, and missing labels

Workflow Automation & AI

• Configure 
 boards and automations that reflect each business’s stage-gated client journey

• Identify opportunities to reduce manual administrative load through intelligent automation

• Support the adoption of AI tools for marketing automation, CRM enhancement, and document generation

• Embed business rules into automation and integration logic, with clear documentation of how each rule is applied

General Technology Support

• Act as the technical point of contact for ongoing technology needs across both Nexia and FINR

• Provide documentation for all systems, integrations, and processes built

• Support iterative testing cycles with each operations team so systems align with how the work actually gets done

Nexia Health Care — Healthcare Operations

Healthcare Pipeline & Reporting

• Maintain the operational tracking dashboard that classifies clients through Nexia’s five-stage pipeline (Lead/Intake through to Follow-Up/Disengaged)

• Build reporting views covering weekly trends, practitioner capacity, DBT pipeline, DNA analysis, cancellation tracking, and wait-time metrics

• Develop visualisations for clinician capacity (booked vs. available), payment plan tracking, and revenue analytics

• Resolve recurring data quality issues such as appointment count mismatches, merged profiles, and missing labels

Halaxy ? 
 Integration

• Build and maintain the integration layer between Halaxy (practice management) and 
 (task and pipeline management)

• Implement and manage a shadow label registry — an external integration layer that derives client state from appointments, invoices, referrals, and coverage data using SQL inference rules

• Work with managed integration platforms to orchestrate data flows as part of the Nexia technical team

• Design around the constraint that Halaxy labels are not API-accessible via FHIR, using the shadow registry architecture


 Configuration & Workflow

• Configure 
 boards reflecting the five-stage client journey and six operational swimlanes (Intake, Operations, Clinician, Specialist, Solutions, Triggers/SLAs)

• Implement gating tasks and sub-tasks that must be completed before a client card can advance to the next pipeline stage

• Coordinate two-week parallel validation cycles with internal Nexia members before any live integration is switched on

FINR Advisory — Financial Advisory Operations

Advisory Client Journey & CRM

• Configure the FINR client journey within 
 (or the chosen CRM) — from discovery and fact-find through statement of advice, implementation, and ongoing review

• Build the integration layer between FINR’s CRM, document management, and portfolio or planning tools (for example Xplan, AdviserLogic, Iress, or equivalent)

• Implement workflow automations that handle file notes, review cadences, fee disclosure tracking, and adviser task lists

Compliance, Reporting & Document Generation

• Develop reporting views covering adviser productivity, fee disclosure status, opt-in renewals, and revenue per client segment

• Support automated generation of advice documents, client correspondence, and review packs from CRM data

• Build dashboards that surface compliance-sensitive metrics — ongoing service obligations, FDS and opt-in deadlines — early enough to action before they slip

Marketing & Client Engagement Automation

• Connect FINR’s marketing stack 
, lead capture, content) into the CRM so prospect journeys are visible end-to-end

• Identify AI-driven opportunities to personalise client communications and reduce adviser admin load

Required Skills & Experience

Dashboard development: proficient in building interactive or single-page business intelligence dashboards

Backend / API development: experience with REST APIs; familiarity with FHIR or healthcare data standards is a plus, as is exposure to financial services data formats

Database: working knowledge of PostgreSQL (or similar RDBMS); able to write SQL inference rules and manage data schemas

Integration platforms: exposure to Power Automate, Zapier, or equivalent iPaaS tools

Data handling: comfortable with data transformation and data quality management

Version control: Git for source control and collaboration

Documentation: able to produce clear technical and client-facing documentation

Desirable (Not Required)

• Experience in either healthcare technology or financial advisory technology — bonus points for both

• Familiarity with Halaxy, 
, Xplan, AdviserLogic, Iress, or similar platforms

• Exposure to BPMN process modelling or business process digitisation

• Experience with managed reporting tools (Metabase, Preset, Tableau)

• Understanding of the Australian regulatory context: NDIS, DVA, and Medicare billing on the healthcare side; FDS, opt-in, and best interests duty on the advisory side

• Python scripting for data processing or automation

What You’ll Get

• Direct mentorship from an experienced technology and operations consultant who works closely with both Nexia and FINR

• End-to-end exposure to two live digitisation projects across very different domains — healthcare delivery and financial advisory

• Hands-on experience integrating real-world practice management, advisory, and project management platforms

• A portfolio-building opportunity with tangible, client-facing deliverables

• A flexible, remote working arrangement with a clear pathway to expanded scope as both businesses grow

How to Apply

Send your CV and a brief video to 
 outlining your relevant experience and interest in healthcare or financial services technology. Include links to any projects, repositories, or portfolio pieces that show how you think and build.

title: Amazon PPC Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon PPC Specialist to support our growing Amazon Private Label brands. This role is ideal for someone who is analytical, detail-oriented, and highly experienced in managing and optimizing PPC campaigns.



Your main focus will be improving ad performance, reducing ACoS, scaling profitable campaigns, and driving overall sales through effective advertising strategies.



Work Schedule



* Philippine Time

* Part-time – 4 hours per day

* 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM (with 1-hour break from 12:00–1:00 PM)



Compensation



* Starting rate: $3/hour

* Increase to $4/hour after probation (based on performance and KPI evaluation)



Key Responsibilities



* Set up, manage, and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display)

* Analyze search term reports and optimize targeting

* Adjust bids, budgets, and placements based on performance

* Scale profitable campaigns and control ACoS/TACoS

* Conduct competitor and market analysis

* Monitor daily campaign performance and key metrics

* Provide actionable insights and optimization suggestions

* Coordinate tasks and updates via Asana

Required Experience



* At least 6 months of hands-on Amazon PPC experience

* Proven experience managing Private Label PPC campaigns

* Strong understanding of ACoS, TACoS, CTR, CVR, and campaign scaling strategies

* Ability to analyze data and make performance-driven decisions

* Experience handling multiple campaigns/accounts



Additional Skills (Plus)



* Experience in listing creation

* Ability to perform keyword research and incorporate it into optimized listing content (titles, bullets, backend search terms)

* Knowledge of how to publish listings on Amazon while following Amazon policies and guidelines



Tools You Must Be Familiar With



* Amazon Campaign Manager

* Helium 10 (or similar keyword tools)

* Keepa

* Google Sheets / Docs

* Asana

* Clockify



We’re Looking For Someone Who Is



* Data-driven and analytical

* Detail-oriented and organized

* Proactive in identifying opportunities for optimization

* Consistent and reliable with daily monitoring

* Comfortable working with SOPs and workflows



To Apply

2. Campaigns or brands you’ve managed

title: AU Tax Accountant
description:
We believe our people are the foundation of our success. Our culture is built on respect, collaboration, and supporting one another.



We strive to create a workplace where employees feel valued, heard, and empowered to grow both personally and professionally. Our leadership is committed to fostering open communication, professional development, and a positive environment where everyone can perform at their best.



If you're looking for a company that values your contribution and supports your growth, we’d love to have you on our team.



Why Join Bravo?

We believe great people deserve great support. Here’s what you can expect when you join us:

-Competitive and stable full-time work from home opportunity

-HMO and Life Insurance coverage

-13th Month Pay

-Government Contributions (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG)

-Sick Leave and Vacation Leave benefits

-Free Training and Professional Development opportunities

-Monthly Virtual Employee Engagement activities (with prizes!)

-Fun Company Get-Togethers

-An Annual Christmas Party that our team truly looks forward to

-Year-End Package



We make sure our team not only works hard, but also feels appreciated and celebrated.



About the Role

We are currently looking for four (4) experienced AU Tax Accountants to join our growing team.

In this role, you will work closely with an Australian firm handling tax compliance and accounting services for a diverse client base. This position offers the opportunity to further develop your expertise in Australian taxation while working in a supportive and collaborative environment.



Key Responsibilities

-Prepare and review Australian Tax Returns, BAS, and Financial Statements

-Ensure compliance with Australian tax regulations and legislation

-Provide tax planning support or advice to clients or internal stakeholders

-Analyze financial statements and provide insights where needed

-Maintain accurate financial records and documentation



What We’re Looking For

-2–5+ years of Australian Tax and Business Services experience

-Ability to prepare tax returns for Individuals, Partnerships, Companies (including Group Companies), and Trusts

-Experience in preparing and reviewing Financial Statements

-Solid understanding of Australian tax legislation, including:

Capital Gains Tax (CGT)

Fringe Benefits Tax (FBT)

Division 7A compliance and application

-Experience in preparing IAS and BAS

-Experience in tax planning is an advantage

-Strong analytical and communication skills

-Proficient in using Xero, XPM, and other accounting software

-Positive and proactive attitude with a fun team spirit

-Bookkeeping experience is a plus



If you're interested in this opportunity, feel free to apply through this job post or send your resume directly to 
 look forward to hearing from you!

title: Stencil Designer + Amazon Listing Image Creator
description:
We need a designer who can do **two related things well**:



1. Convert source artwork (provided by us) into clean, cuttable stencil files in Adobe Illustrator

2. Create 2 Amazon listing images per design using our pre-built templates



For each design, you'll:



 Part 1 — Stencil File Prep (Illustrator)



- Take a source file we provide (PNG, JPG, AI, or hand-sketched image)

- Convert it to a clean cuttable stencil in Illustrator:

  - Image trace + clean up paths

  - Add bridges where needed so islands don't fall out (e.g., the inside of an "O" needs to stay attached)

  - Verify cut paths are continuous and laser-ready

  - Save as .ai master file

- Export a flat preview PNG/JPG



Part 2 — Amazon Listing Images (Photoshop or Illustrator)



For each approved stencil design, create **2 listing images** using our pre-built templates:



1. **Main image** — stencil on white background (Amazon required: pure white, 85% frame fill, no text/borders/logos)

2. **Lifestyle image** — stencil rendered as final paint output (e.g., the design painted on a wall, wood, or canvas)



We provide reusable templates with placeholder slots. Your job is to drop the new artwork into the template, not design from scratch every time. Once you're trained on the templates, each listing should take ~10 minutes of image work after the stencil prep is done.



File Delivery



- Master stencil file: `.ai` (Illustrator)

- Preview: `.png` at 2000x2000px on white

- Listing images: 2x JPGs at 2000x2000px, named per our SKU convention

- All saved to a designated Google Drive folder per SKU



Required Skills & Experience



- **3+ years Adobe Illustrator** — image trace, pathfinder, bridge creation, vector cleanup

- **2+ years Adobe Photoshop** — template-based design work, image compositing

- **Stencil/laser cut experience preferred** — you understand bridges, islands, kerf, and continuous cut paths. (If you've never done stencils, you must have die-cut, vinyl-cut, or similar vector prep experience.)

- **Amazon listing image experience** — you've made Amazon main images before and know the rules (pure white background, 85% frame fill, no text/borders/logos)

- **Reliability and consistency** — same look, same quality, every time



Nice to Have



- Familiarity with arts/crafts/DIY product categories

- Background in surface design, textile design, or pattern work

- Ability to suggest design improvements (e.g., "this skull will lose detail at small sizes — recommend simplifying these areas")



Time Commitment



- ~10-25 hours per week, flexible schedule



---



**Note:** We are NOT looking for someone to design original artwork from scratch. We provide source images and concepts. Your job is to take that input, convert it to production-ready files, and create listing imagery using our templates.

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:

Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



Fill in the application form: 
/to/O40RINeW



Important note: Put “CFM” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Amazon Listing Creator
description:
What You'll Be Doing



You'll work from our Trello board where pre-approved designs are queued. For each card, you'll:



1. Pull the design files and listing images from our Google Drive

2. Write the Amazon listing copy:

   - Product title (~200 chars, following our title format)

   - Five bullet points

   - Product description

   - Backend search terms (~250 chars)

3. Build the Amazon flat file with all 5 size variants (6", 12", 18", 24", 36") per design

4. Upload via Amazon Seller Central (Inventory ? Add Products via Upload)

5. Verify listings go live and update the Trello card status



We provide:

- Pre-built listing image templates

- A title format / SEO style guide

- A backend keyword research database (real Amazon Brand Analytics data)

- All design files and product imagery

- Standard pricing and size structure



You provide:

- Reliability, attention to detail, and consistent volume

- Strong written English (US-style product copy)

- Ability to follow systems without needing constant re-explanation



Required Skills & Experience



- **2+ years building Amazon listings** (FBM specifically, since this is FBM, not FBA)

- **Hands-on flat file experience** — you should know what an inventory loader file looks like, how parent/child variations work, and how to handle backend keywords without errors

- **Brand Registry experience** — you've worked with Brand Analytics, A+ content, etc.

- **Amazon SEO fundamentals** — title optimization, keyword research, search relevance

- Comfort with Google Drive, Google Sheets, and Trello

- Strong written English, preferably US-style



Nice to Have



- Experience in print-on-demand or made-to-order categories

- Background in arts/crafts/DIY product categories

- Familiarity with Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar tools (we use Amazon Brand Analytics natively, but adjacent experience is a plus)

- Prior work scaling catalogs from thousands to tens of thousands of SKUs



Time Commitment



- ~10-20 hours per week, flexible schedule

title: Appointment Setter / SDR
description:
About NeuraWeave AI Solutions LLC



We are a U.S.-based company that installs AI-powered voice agents for small businesses — helping local service companies answer every call automatically, capture leads, and book appointments 24/7. We are growing fast and looking for a driven, experienced appointment setter to join our remote team.



Your Role



Your sole job is to contact business owners from our pre-researched lead list and book them for a 15-minute demo call with our closer. You are not selling anything — you are starting a conversation and getting a meeting on the calendar. Every lead you call has been pre-researched and flagged based on verified pain points, so you will always have a specific reason to reach out.



What You'll Do



Make outbound phone calls to 20–30 leads per day from our Google Sheet — a mix of new leads and follow-ups on previous no-answers

Send follow-up
s to prospects who request more information before committing to a call

Update lead statuses in our Google Sheet after every contact attempt — accuracy here is essential

Book interested prospects directly into our closer's Calendly

Target: 5–8 booked demo calls per week



Requirements



Strong spoken English is required — you will be speaking with U.S. business owners by phone

Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience required

Comfortable with rejection and consistent outreach volume

Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace

Detail-oriented — Google Sheet must be kept accurate and up to date at all times



Nice to Have:



Spanish speaking ability

Experience in SaaS, AI tools, or service business outreach

Familiarity with HVAC or other home service industries

Familiarity with Google Sheets or CRM tools such as GoHighLevel



Details:



Remote / work from home

20 hours per week

$6.00/hour + 5% commission on setup fees from deals closed from your booked demos

Primary outreach method is outbound phone calls;
 follow-up is secondary

Outreach must take place during U.S. business hours (9am–5pm PST) as you will be calling American business owners

Hours are tracked via the OnlineJobs.ph time tracker — the tracker must be running whenever you are working

Pay is processed every Friday PST — please note this falls on Saturday morning Manila time

This role includes a 2-week paid trial period. To continue beyond the trial, you must demonstrate consistent call volume and booked demos. Candidates who meet expectations will be offered continued employment.



To apply, please include: your previous appointment setting or cold calling experience, the industries you have worked in, and your average daily call volume in previous roles. Applications without this information will not be considered.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant — Ecommerce/DTC Consulting Firm

title: Video Post-Production & Editing Specialist
description:
Hello!



We’re looking for a Video Post-Production & Editing Specialist to play a vital role in supporting our brand and marketing agency’s content efforts. This is an exciting opportunity to join a creative, high-standards team where your execution skills and creative judgment directly contribute to building demand and business 
ntum for founders, executives, and growing B2B brands.



In this role, you will work closely with the founder, a seasoned brand and marketing leader who values craft, strategic thinking, and long-term partnerships. You will not just “cut clips,” but help shape how ideas land in the world through well-edited, well-paced, and platform-optimized video content.



To apply, please read the full description and see the TO APPLY section at the end of this posting.



LOCATION: Remote (Preferably based in the Philippines)

JOB TYPE: Part-time contractor, approximately 15 hours per week, with the potential to increase over time as the client base grows. 



ROLE OVERVIEW

This role is focused on video post-production and editing across multiple client accounts. You will primarily take raw footage recorded in the U.S. by both professional film crews, and the executives themselves, and transform it into polished, compelling content for:

Social Media (LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube)

Podcast episodes and other video assets

PR, thought leadership, and executive visibility content



Our customers are primarily B2B companies, with occasional B2C brands or founder-led businesses. This is fast, platform-native, performance-driven editing — not slow, cinematic work. 



SCOPE OF WORK

-Video Editing & Post-Production

-Edit long-form and short-form video content from raw footage into polished, professional outputs.

-Create platform-native social clips optimized for LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube.

-Support podcast production through video edits, cut-downs, and visual consistency.

-Prepare video assets for PR, events, presentations, and thought-leadership use.

-Build strong hooks, pacing, retention, and clear CTAs appropriate to each platform.

-Create multiple versions of videos for testing when needed.

-Source stock footage, sound effects, and music when required.

-Deliver clean, organized exports on time and to spec.

-Use AI tools to speed up captions, cleanup, and enhancement workflows.

-This role prioritizes speed, clarity, and performance over cinematic or experimental editing.

-Content Judgment & Storytelling

-Identify strong 
nts, hooks, and sound bites worth clipping and amplifying.

-Understand brand positioning and messaging well enough to make smart editorial decisions.

-Translate long-form conversations into clear, engaging short-form content.





Collaboration

-Work closely with the founder and marketing strategists to align edits with content goals.

-Incorporate feedback efficiently while maintaining quality standards.

-Manage multiple projects and timelines with consistency and reliability.



REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of professional video editing and post-production experience.

-Experience working with B2B brands, with exposure to B2C brands and/or influencers.

-Strong understanding of conversion-oriented, performance-driven editing for social platforms.

-Familiarity with performance metrics such as watch time, retention, CTR, and engagement.

-Strong understanding of conversion-oriented editing for social platforms.

-High attention to detail, consistency in delivering clean, on-spec exports, and pride in producing polished work.

-Strong written and verbal English communication skills, including the ability to collaborate clearly and efficiently in a remote environment.

-Ability to work independently and manage deadlines in a fully remote environment.

-Reliable computer capable of handling video editing software.

-Stable internet connection for file transfers and video calls.



NICE TO HAVES

Experience with motion graphics or simple animations.

Experience adding captions and formatting videos for social platforms.

Familiarity with B2B SaaS, professional services, or founder-led brands.

Experience editing content for influencers or personal brands.

Comfort working from creative briefs rather than rigid instructions.



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

-Hourly contractor role

-Rate: $6 USD per hour, paid bi-weekly

-13th month guaranteed

-Paid birthday off

-Government dues are the responsibility of the contractor

-Remote Work: Enjoy the flexibility of working from anywhere.

-Flexible Hours: Work Monday - Friday, with 1-3 live check-in meetings every week to match EST (some weeks may require more or less depending on current projects, advanced notice will be provided for those weeks)

-Growth Opportunities: Potential for role expansion and additional responsibilities as the company grows.

-Small Team Environment: Work closely with a supportive and collaborative team where your contributions make a real impact.

-Holiday Flexibility: Option to adjust work schedules around local holidays and personal commitments.



TOOLS 

-Professional video editing tools (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve)

-Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, Sheets)

-Slack for team and client communication

-Project management tools such as Notion, 
 or Asana

-Google Meet for check-ins as needed





WORKING STYLE

-You should be comfortable working asynchronously, asking clarifying questions via
 and Slack, and delivering work you stand behind.



LONG-TERM MINDSET

This is not a short-term or transactional role. We are looking for someone who wants to build a long-term working relationship, grow alongside the business, and take pride in being a trusted creative partner.



TO APPLY

If you meet the requirements and are excited about this opportunity, we’d love to hear from you. Submit the following with the subject line “Video Editor – [Your Name]”:

1. Your CV

2. A link to your portfolio or multiple examples of video work (required)

3. A cover letter answering the questions below: 

-What is it about this role that appeals to you?

-Describe your experience editing video for B2B and/or B2C brands.

-Why do you think you'd be a great fit?

-How do you approach identifying strong hooks or 
nts in long-form footage?



If selected, are you willing to complete a paid skills test project relevant to this role?



Please note, we will not proceed with applicants that have not answered the questions.



Please use a minimum of 3 apply points. 



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Product Growth Manager (DTC E-commerce – Shopify)
description:
We are a fast-scaling DTC e-commerce brand and are looking for a Product Growth Manager to take full ownership of our product pipeline.



This is NOT just a VA role.

This is NOT just product research.

This is a high-ownership role for someone who can independently drive product expansion and execution.



---



THIS ROLE IS FULL PRODUCT OWNERSHIP



You will be responsible for:



* Identifying and developing new product & collection ideas

* Sourcing products and securing COGs quickly

* Creating high-converting product listings (images + copy)

* Generating AI product images + descriptions

* Ensuring product quality matches what is shown on the website

* Managing the full product pipeline from idea ? live product

* Continuously launching and improving products without being told



Your core objective:



Ensure the brand consistently launches winning products and collections — without founder involvement



HARD REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Do NOT apply if you do not meet ALL of the following:



* You have worked inside a DTC e-commerce brand (Shopify preferred)

* You have been responsible for both product research AND execution

* You can independently source products and obtain COGs from suppliers

* You have experience creating product pages, images, and positioning

* You understand what makes a product convert and fit a brand

* You are fast, proactive, and do not wait for instructions

* You have experience working with AI tools for images/content (Midjourney, etc.)

* You can manage multiple products and collections at the same time



If you only have experience in product research, listing, or VA work — this role is NOT for you.



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



You are:



* Highly independent and proactive

* Creative and commercially driven

* Fast in execution and decision-making

* Structured in managing workflows and output

* Obsessed with improving and launching products

* Comfortable taking full ownership without guidance



---



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



* You need step-by-step instructions

* You only follow tasks instead of thinking

* You have never owned product outcomes

* You only have experience as a product lister or researcher

* You wait instead of taking initiative



---



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



* New products and collections are launched consistently

* Products are sourced quickly with clear margins

* Listings are high quality and conversion-focused

* Product quality matches what is shown online

* The product pipeline runs without founder involvement



---



APPLICATION (MANDATORY)



To apply, you MUST answer:



1. What DTC brand(s) have you worked for? Include revenue level

2. Describe a product you launched from idea ? live

3. How do you find and validate new product ideas?

4. How do you source products and secure COGs quickly?

5. What would you do in your first 14 days in this role?



Applications without these answers will be ignored.



---



We are looking for a long-term operator who wants ownership, responsibility, and growth inside a fast-scaling brand.



If that’s you — apply.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
WE’RE HIRING: Executive Assistant

Full Time | Remote | US Hours



Are you a highly seasoned Executive Assistant who thrives in organized chaos and knows how to support a high-visibility CEO with calm authority?

If you’re discreet, proactive, and able to manage both professional and personal priorities without constant direction, this role might be the right fit for you.



What You Will Do

• Manage the CEO’s inbox, calendar, scheduling, and meeting preparation

• Act as a trusted gatekeeper with internal teams and external contacts

• Coordinate complex travel plans, including last-minute changes

• Track deadlines, commitments, and follow-ups to ensure nothing is missed

• Support personal logistics such as appointments, reminders, and important dates

• Assist with projects, publishing initiatives, and one-off executive priorities

• Coordinate across departments, including operations, finance, and creative teams



Who You Are

• 7+ years of experience supporting senior executives, founders, or public-facing leaders

• Highly professional, discreet, and calm under pressure

• Strong judgment with the confidence to push back diplomatically when needed

• Proactive, solutions-oriented, and able to anticipate needs

• Comfortable managing both personal and professional domains seamlessly

• Highly responsive and dependable, with flexibility outside standard business hours

• Experienced working remotely and staying aligned across time zones



To apply, send your resume along with answers to the questions below. To be considered, please ensure all questions are answered in full.

1. Walk me through a day where everything felt urgent. How did you d
 what actually got the CEO’s attention first?

2. How do you d
 when to act independently versus when to loop the CEO in?

3. Tell me about a time you had to push back on someone requesting the CEO’s time. What did you say and why?

4. What information do you automatically treat as non-shareable, even internally? Can you give an example?

5. Describe a last-minute change — travel, schedule, or event — and what you did first.

title: HR/Recruiter
description:
We are a growing logistics and transportation company based in the United States, and we are looking for a dedicated, detail-oriented Full-Time Recruiter to join our team.



This is a long-term, stable position with room for growth for the right person.



About the Role



You will be responsible for managing the full recruiting cycle, primarily hiring drivers and operations staff for our transportation business. We need someone who is proactive, organized, and confident communicating with candidates.



Responsibilities



* Post job ads on various platforms

* Source and screen candidates

* Conduct initial interviews (chat, phone, or Zoom)

* Schedule interviews with management

* Maintain applicant tracking and hiring records

* Follow up with candidates throughout the hiring process

* Assist with onboarding and documentation

* Provide weekly hiring updates and reports



Requirements



* Previous experience in recruiting or HR (required)

* Strong English communication (written and verbal)

* Experience with remote hiring or US-based companies (preferred)

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

* Comfortable using tools like Google Workspace, Zoom, and spreadsheets



Work Schedule



* Full-time (40 hours per week)

* Must be available during US business hours (Arizona time)



Compensation



* Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

* Opportunity for performance-based bonuses

* Long-term growth within the company



Why Join Us



* Stable, long-term position

* Supportive and professional team

* Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving company

* Clear expectations and structured processes



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



1. Your resume

2. A short introduction about your recruiting experience

3. The word “STRONG” at the top of your application (to confirm attention to detail)

4. Your expected monthly salary

title: SketchUp 3D Modeller / Draftsperson (Construction-Focused)
description:
We are looking for a highly capable SketchUp 3D modeller to assist with building accurate, real-world construction models and client-ready visual proposals.



This role is focused on assembling and adapting an existing system, not designing from scratch.



---

IMMEDIATE PROJECT (READY TO START)



We have a project ready to go immediately.



You will be provided with:

- A **clean, high-quality site image**  

- **Marked-up sketches** showing layout and component positions  

- **All required dimensions**  

- **SketchUp (.SKP) component files** where available  



Your role is to:

? Overlay and position the system correctly  

? Build out the model accurately  

? Present it cleanly and professionally  



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will be responsible for:



- Building **site-specific 3D models** using:

  - photos  

  - sketches  

  - measurements  



- Working with **existing SketchUp component libraries**  

- Modelling **real construction layouts** (not conceptual design)  

- Producing **clean, accurate visuals for client proposals**  

- Refining and improving presentation quality  



---



### KEY REQUIREMENTS



- Strong proficiency in **SketchUp (essential)** 

- Own the SketchUp software 

- Experience working with **existing component files**  

- Strong understanding of:

  - scale  

  - proportion  

  - real-world construction  



- Ability to interpret:

  - rough sketches  

  - marked-up images  

  - dimensioned layouts  





### IDEAL BACKGROUND



- Draftsperson, architect, or construction-related experience  

- Experience modelling:

  - scaffold systems  

  - steel structures  

  - modular systems  



---



### BONUS SKILLS



- Rendering (Enscape, V-Ray, Twinmotion, etc.)  

- Ability to produce **clean client presentation visuals**  

- Basic animation / walkthroughs  



---



### WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



You can take:

- a real site image  

- a marked-up sketch  

- dimensioned instructions  



And turn it into:

- a clean, accurate model  

- that reflects how the system would actually be built  

- and presents well to a client  



---



### ROLE DETAILS



- Remote  

- Project-based to start  

- Strong potential for **ongoing, long-term work**  

- Immediate start available  



---



### HOW TO APPLY



Please include:



1. Examples of **SketchUp models** (construction-related preferred)  

2. Any rendering or presentation work  

3. Brief summary of your **construction or drafting experience**  

4. Your availability and typical turnaround time  



---



### IMPORTANT



We are looking for someone who understands **how things are actually built**, not just how they look.



Accuracy, speed, and practical thinking are critical.

title: Faceless Video Producer and Growth Architect (Audience Physics Specialist)
description:
We are building a premium, faceless kitchen brand designed to become a category-leading digital asset. This is a founding role for a Content Architect who understands Audience Physics. We are not looking for simple views; we are looking for a loyal, high-quality following that trusts our aesthetic, clicks our recommendations, and eventually invests in our digital product ecosystem. This business is built on a foundation of consistency over perfection and showing up every day.



The Vision

Our brand follows a Porsche-style aesthetic: clean, wealthy, and healthy. Your job is to stop the swipe in under 500ms and engineer a Follower Contract that converts strangers into long-term fans who rely on our expertise for their kitchen setup.



The Core Requirements

Zero-Raw-Footage Sourcing: We provide ZERO raw footage.



Sourcing Mastery: You must be a master at finding and sourcing elite, royalty-free clips from platforms like Pexels, Pixabay, Storyblocks, and Unsplash and blending them so the brand feels cohesive and bespoke.



Faceless Production Mastery: Expert-level in Adobe Premiere, After Effects, or CapCut.



Technical Skills: You know how to make stock footage look like custom-shot cinema through color grading and speed ramping.



Audience Growth Engineering: You understand how to attract high-quality, engaged followers who actually interact with the content and click our featured affiliate and digital product links.



Retention and Swipe-Stop Physics: You live by the 0.0s Action Rule, using pattern interrupts and specific pacing to maintain 70%+ retention.



Bonus Skills

AI Augmentation: A major advantage if you use generative tools like Runway, Sora, or Luma to create specific shots that standard stock footage cannot provide.



Compensation and Communication

Fixed Monthly Retainer: 3,000 NOK (Approximately 19,900 PHP).



Disclaimer: The PHP amount is provided for reference only. Actual payment is made in NOK, and the final PHP amount received will fluctuate based on the currency exchange rate at the time of transfer.



Payment Method: Paid via Wise.



Volume: 10 high-impact, high-retention videos per month.



Workflow: We communicate and operate via Slack.



Growth: This is a founding role designed for significant multi-stage expansion. As the brand hits subscriber and engagement targets, this role is designed to scale in both volume and compensation.



How to Apply

Subject Line: PORSCHE [Your Name]



The Portfolio: Attach a portfolio of short-form content that you have personally produced from scratch. While faceless, stock-based content is preferred, we value any work that demonstrates elite pacing and high aesthetic.



The Growth Test: Explain your specific technique for ensuring the followers we gain are high-intent clickers and buyers rather than just random scrollers.



The Workflow: List the tools and sourcing techniques you use to ensure a video never feels generic or cheap.

title: Research VA
description:
We’re a US-based AI marketing startup for the home services industry (plumbers, HVAC, electricians). We need 2-4 sharp Research VAs to build prospect lists across 50 US cities.

What you’ll do every day:

 • Search
 Marketplace in assigned US cities for plumbing, HVAC, and electrical service posts

 • Log which businesses are actively posting, which stopped, and which are absent

 • Organize and clean data from purchased lead lists (Google Maps data, business directories)

 • Build scored prospect spreadsheets in Google Sheets — business name, phone,
, reviews, website, Marketplace activity

 • Cross-reference multiple data sources into a single clean master list per city

 • Follow detailed SOPs (recorded Loom walkthroughs provided for every task)

You’re a great fit if you:

 • Have strong Google Sheets skills (formulas, filters, data validation)

 • Are detail-obsessed — one wrong phone number ruins a lead

 • Can follow SOPs precisely without supervision

 • Have experience with web research, data entry, or lead generation

 • Have a stable internet connection and a quiet workspace

 • Can work US business hours (or overlap at least 4 hours)

Paid 1-week trial before full commitment. We pay above average because we expect above-average work.

Trial Task: Map every plumber in Jacksonville, FL from Google Maps and categorize their
 Marketplace presence. Deliver a scored spreadsheet.

title: LinkedIn Growth & Outreach VA
description:
I’m the Head of Account Strategy at an automotive AI company. I need a sharp, reliable VA to build my LinkedIn presence and run outbound prospecting through LinkedIn Sales Navigator.

This is NOT a generic social media management role. You will be using a custom AI writing tool (Claude) that already knows my voice, my industry, and my sales methodology. Your job is to operate the system. You research prospects, copy relevant context into the tool, it generates personalized outreach and content in my voice, and you send it.

What you’ll do every day:

 • Use LinkedIn Sales Navigator to research and identify prospects at car dealerships and dealer groups across the US

 • Send 15-20 personalized outreach messages per day (connection requests + InMail) to decision-makers

 • Manage follow-up sequences for prospects who don’t respond (2 follow-ups max per person)

 • Send 15-20 additional network-building connection requests per day

 • Comment on 15-25 industry posts using AI-generated comments

 • Post 3-5 LinkedIn posts per week

 • Respond to comments on my posts

 • Track everything in a Google Sheet (outreach pipeline, connections, engagement, post performance)

 • Escalate immediately when a prospect replies with interest in a meeting or demo

What you will NOT do:

 • Write content from scratch (the AI tool handles this)

 • Use any LinkedIn automation software (Dux-Soup, Expandi, PhantomBuster, etc.)

 • Handle live calls or demos (you hand off to me when a prospect is ready)

 • Reply to prospects on your own without running it through the AI tool first

 • Manage other social media platforms



Requirements

Must-Have:

 • Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator (searching, filtering, building lead lists, sending InMail)

 • Strong English reading comprehension (you need to read LinkedIn posts and prospect profiles accurately and summarize context for the AI tool)

 • Reliable internet connection and a computer (not phone-only)

 • Comfortable using browser-based tools (LinkedIn, Sales Navigator, Google Sheets, Claude AI)

 • Attention to detail (copy-paste accuracy and tracking discipline are critical)

 • Consistent and self-directed (daily volume needs to get done without reminders)

 • Available to overlap with US Eastern Time for at least 2-3 hours per day

Nice-to-Have:

 • Previous experience running LinkedIn outreach for a B2B company or executive

 • Familiarity with the automotive industry (dealerships, service departments, BDC)

 • Experience using AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude

 • Understanding of consultative selling or lead generation concepts

 • Previous VA experience on OnlineJobs.ph with references



What Success Looks Like

Month 1: You’re comfortable with the workflow. Outreach messages go out daily. Follow-ups are on schedule. Engagement is consistent. Tracking sheet is current. Tom is getting 3-5 prospect responses per week.

Month 3: Outreach pipeline is generating 2-4 booked meetings per month. LinkedIn network has grown by 500-1,000+ targeted connections. Engagement on posts is growing. Inbound DMs are increasing.

Month 6: LinkedIn is a consistent source of warm leads and meetings. You’re operating independently and Tom’s LinkedIn is a recognized voice in automotive AI.



How This Works

 1. I give you access to a Claude AI project that has my writing style, industry knowledge, and sales methodology pre-loaded.

 2. I give you access to LinkedIn Sales Navigator with saved searches and lead lists of target dealership decision-makers.

 3. I give you a detailed operating instructions document that walks you through every step of the daily workflow, including outreach templates, follow-up sequences, and escalation rules.

 4. You send me a short weekly report with outreach numbers, response rates, meetings booked, and any flags.

The system is already built. I need someone reliable and detail-oriented to run it daily.



To Apply

Please answer these four questions in your application:

 1. Describe your experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator. What types of searches have you run and how did you use the results?

 2. Have you ever managed LinkedIn outreach or engagement for someone else? If yes, describe the volume and results.

 3. How many hours per day are you available, and what time zone are you in?

 4. Here’s a scenario: You find a General Manager at a Toyota dealership in Texas on Sales Navigator. His profile says he’s been in the role for 3 years and recently posted about service department staffing challenges. Write 2-3 sentences describing what context you would paste into the AI tool to get a good outreach message.

Do not send a generic application. I will skip any response that doesn’t answer these four questions.
